programme.desc: Kurapika and the other job applicants are attacked in the mansion of a flesh collector.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kirara has been weakened by Naraku's poison. Inuyasha and Kagome go looking for an antidotal herb.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha and Miroku come across a cave when they go looking for the source of a strong evil presence.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango reveals the secret story of the Shikon Jewel's birth.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Inuyasha and the gang meet Taromaru, the son of a village leader. They go to the Temple of the Water God, where children are being sacrificed.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: A demon injures Miroku's Wind Tunnel. Miroku visits the temple of Mushin, the man who raised him, for help treating the injury.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango's younger brother, Kohaku, who's supposed to be dead, is alive.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Sango steals the Tetsusaiga and is led to Naraku's castle. Sango tries to use the opportunity to kill Naraku.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: As Fransia forms an alliance with the Demon Kingdom and Conrad remains imprisoned, Yuri and the others seek to discover the reason for his betrayal.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri's older brother thinks back to when Yuri was younger and the two brothers spent the day at an amusement park to get away from their feuding parents.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: A number of children are gathered for a celebration at Covenant Castle, including Hube and Nicola's son El, but things go crazy when El's magic powers are amplified by one of Anissina's devices!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Lady Ulrike falls ill, while at the same time, a girl that resembles her appears in town and demonstrates incredible magical powers, leaving Yuri, Wolfram, and Conrad to try and rein her in.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Princess Elizabeth, the winner of the Great Demon Kingdom beauty pageant, is used by Stoffel to enact a plan to form a bond with Yuri, but she claims to already be engaged... to Wolfram?!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Continuing the hunt for the final box, Yuri and the others hear of a box at the bottom of a lake and head there, where they meet Ulrike's predecessor and learn of the history of the land around them.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Bandits threaten a small town and Gwendal finds himself joining Conrad's father, Lord Dunheely, in helping the townspeople. Can Gwendal set aside his prejudice against humans for the good of the people?

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Big Cimaron proposes a student exchange as a cover to strike back after their box is stolen, but the Great Demon Kingdom and their allies don't fall for it, leading Gwendal to plan his own covert mission.

programme.title: Death Note: Silence
programme.desc: Light, his memory recovered, orders Misa to begin killing after Higuchi dies.

programme.title: Death Note: Renewal
programme.desc: Light has removed everyone in his way and is closer to achieving his perfect world.

programme.title: Death Note: Abduction
programme.desc: A new investigator steps forward, Near, a central figure in the SPK, an organization that is trying to catch Kira without relying on L.

programme.title: Death Note: Impatience
programme.desc: Light, acting as L, reveals to Near that his sister Sayu has been kidnapped by someone wanting to trade her for the Death Note.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua resume Nen training.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The curtain rises on the battle between Gon and Hisoka.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon lands a solid punch on Hisoka and returns the tag.

programme.desc: After mastering Nen and becoming a real Hunter, Gon returns to Whale Island with Killua.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Jonathan Pratt drive from Middleham in Yorkshire through to Halifax in their classic car, looking to make a profit at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning shows an unusual taste in sculpture and Jonathan Pratt opts for something very shapely as the experts head for north Wales.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On the last leg of their road trip Anita Manning and Jonathan Pratt head for Anglesey for their final auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a brand-new road trip and antiques experts David Harper and Catherine Southon journey through Lancashire heading for their first auction in the sea-faring city of Liverpool.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper goes to jail and Catherine Southon goes to church on the second leg of their antiques road trip through north Wales and Shropshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts David Harper and Catherine Southon go on a buying spree through mid-Wales on the third leg of their journey from Lancashire to Devon.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper brushes shoulders with a TV classic and Catherine Southon gets a taste for one of Gloucester's finest edibles as they head for auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon gets to dance and David Harper finds himself financially embarrassed as they head for a final auction showdown at Seaton in Devon.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On this first leg Anita Manning and James Lewis start out in Deddington, Oxfordshire, then cross into Hertfordshire for auction in St Albans.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and James Lewis head to the London district of Wimbledon, travel through Molesey in Surrey then to auction near Alresford in Hampshire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and James Lewis begin near Lacock in Wiltshire, then visit Bath, Frome and Swindon en route to auction in Cirencester, Gloucestershire.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and James Lewis wind through Devon, beginning in Exeter and traveling though Crediton and Torquay, headed for auction in Chudleigh.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On their last leg, Anita Manning and James Lewis begin in Dorchester, then travel to Portsmouth and Fareham before their final auction in London.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new trip for Mark Stacey and Will Axon, traveling through East Sussex, from Hastings to an auction battle in Lewes.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow is at Crathes Castle in Aberdeenshire where treasures turning up include a stunning Cartier clock, a tiny bowl with a giant price tag, and a royal portrait that is not all that it seems.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow comes from Aerospace in Bristol, under the wings of Concorde, where discoveries include a four-leaf clover brooch which brings luck to its owner, and a collection of Radiohead memorabilia.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and Antiques Roadshow experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in North Wales, the home of the Yorke family.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The roadshow comes from Buckfast Abbey, a Benedictine monastery on the edge of Dartmoor in Devon, celebrating 1,000 years since worship began on this site.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Antiques Roadshow comes from the Piece Hall in Halifax, recently restored to its full Georgian glory. Treasures turning up include a royal portrait by Beryl Cook and artwork by the 'Pennine Painter' Peter Brook.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Wrest Park in Bedfordshire is the setting for today's roadshow, where treasures include a piece of Murano glass inspired by Picasso and a collection of 1950s advertising posters for Vauxhall cars.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow is at Media City UK, on the site of the former Manchester docks. Fiona Bruce investigates the history of the Manchester Ship Canal, which links the inland city to the River Mersey and the Irish Sea.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow is on Cromer pier in Norfolk. Treasures brought along by the public include a letter from John Lennon, a contraption marked 'Certain Death' and some valuable Swedish glass bought at a church sale.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow comes from Eltham Palace, an art deco gem in the leafy suburbs of south London. On a hazy summer's day, the crowds turn out in force bringing their family treasures with them.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Tonight's Antiques Roadshow brings you some of our favourite finds from the last 25 years, including updates on some stories and expert insight into others.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow comes from the colourful surrounds of Morden Hall Park in south London, where big value finds include a rare Cartier driver's watch, a tiny painting by a German impressionist and a plate designed by Pablo Picasso.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This special edition of Antiques Roadshow, marking 80 years since the start of World War II, brings fresh insights to the conflict through personal stories and family mementos.

programme.title: The Life of Mammals

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep21

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep22

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7

programme.title: Bellator 200: Carvalho vs Mousasi
programme.desc: Bellator MMA’s historic 200th event in London features Rafael Carvalho putting his middleweight world title on the line against one of the best in the world, Gegard Mousasi. Plus, Michael “Venom” Page looks to finish David “The Caveman” Rickels.

programme.title: Bellator 201: Macfarlane vs Lara
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to California as women’s flyweight world champion Ilima-Lei Macfarlane looks to defend her title against fast-rising Colombian sensation Alejandra Lara. Ryan Couture takes on Saad Awad, and Juan Archuleta returns to action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville, OK as Julia Budd puts her women’s featherweight world championship on the line against the undefeated Talita Nogueira in the main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Sioux Falls as South Dakota native Logan Storley looks to extend his undefeated streak as he takes on the always dangerous AJ Matthews. Bantamweight king Darrion Caldwell moves up to featherweight to face Noad.

programme.title: Best of Gegard Mousasi
programme.desc: Showcasing the best fights of Gegard Mousasi!

programme.title: Best of Gokhan Saricam
programme.desc: Showcasing the best fights of Gokhan Saricam!

programme.title: Best of James Gallagher
programme.desc: Showcasing the best fights of James Gallagher!

programme.title: Best of Juan Archuleta
programme.desc: Showcasing the best fights of Juan Archuleta!

programme.title: Bellator 205: McKee vs Macapa
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Boise, Idaho with an explosive featherweight main event as rising star AJ McKee takes on dangerous veteran John Macapa. Also looking to stay undefeated is Rafael Lovato Jr. as he faces fellow submission specialist John Salter.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Jose. Legends Rampage Jackson and Wanderlei Silva settle the score with a rematch ten years in the making. Finally, in the main event Gegard Mousasi defends his Middleweight belt against Rory MacDonald.

programme.title: Bellator 207: Mitrione vs Bader
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun as Matt Mitrione faces off against Ryan Bader in the Heavyweight World Grand Prix semifinals. Roy “Big County” Nelson takes on dangerous Russian Sergei Kharitonov, and top welterweight contender Lorenz Larkin returns.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his work with a family ripped apart by accusations of child molestation. Father Jason agrees to take a polygraph test to prove his innocence. Tune in to find out the results and what's next for this family!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: People, eager to give opinions, can lose an entire career with just one tweet. Kathy won Miss Michigan 2019 but lost the crown the next day because of comments she made on social media.Plus, Carissa's transphobic posts derailed her dreams.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From curing rare forms of cancer to foreseeing mass destruction, to freeing others from sickness and sin, Julia believes she is "God's chosen prophet". Parents, Mark and Cheryll, worry their daughter is mentally ill with deep concern for the grandkids.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heather's son, Brandon, 15, died of an accidental overdose at her home; authorities say the teen swallowed & snorted Heather's morphine pills while drinking vodka and beer. Acquitted of charges, Heather says her ex-husband Brian continues to blame her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Tom is 100% convinced his fiancée, Teaka, is cheating on him with his friends, neighbors, coworkers, & even the mailman! Tom has all-new video evidence to show Dr. Phil & Teaka to prove Teaka's unfaithfulness. Teaka declares she has never cheated on Tom.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: From sending sexual text messages to taking a punch to the face for fun, today's teens are engaging in outrageous trends. Dr. Phil helps parents decide what behavior is normal and what is out of control.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Brian, Liz, & Bethany. Now former friend Sarah says she lies as her "real" life is "not very exciting." Michelle, who is a cancer survivor and former friend of Sarah's, confronts Sarah for the first time. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trisha launched a YouTube channel, "Truthfully Trisha". She says she deals with her family's disapproval and also her online "haters". Husband, Sean, says he's fed up with his wife's streaming. Can Dr. Phil help Trisha disconnect to focus on family? Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil's guests engage in a heated debate about the rights of men and women when a child is conceived out of wedlock. Should the biological father be forced to pay child support for a child he didn't know existed or did not plan?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom, Vicki, has been married to Marissa's dad, Robert, for 34 years. Marissa discovered her dad was having an "affair" and visiting "porn" and "call girl" websites. Robert, a former pastor, admits a relationship, but insists he's a victim.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shaela went from being a mom to two with a master's degree working as a school counselor to being unemployed & living in an RV. Mom Sandra says Shaela has exhibited strange behaviors, including trimming bushes & pulling weeds in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil meets Candice, who says she is convinced her mom, Lois, is being scammed by men online. Sister LouAnn says Lois sacrificed her 37-year marriage & retirement savings. Lois's only barrier to the love of her life? He is stuck in Africa. Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kala Brown made national headlines when she was discovered alive 2 months after disappearng in South Carolina. She was kidnapped, locked in a metal storage container & chained on the neck by a serial killer. Kala speaks about her life in captivity.Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer claims her family has been the victim of hackers for 2 years. The problem is her husband, Billy, thinks she is the hacker! Things are so bad that Billy has asked for a divorce. Jennifer says she wants to clear her name & save her marriage! Pt.1

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: We're celebrating the Oscars and style sheriffs Melissa Rivers, Law Roach and Christian Siriano are joining Drew and Ross Mathews for a special fashion panel.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tamera Mowry Housley opens up about sharing her spicy to-do list with her husband in her new memoir, "You Should Sit Down For This!," the possibility of a "Sister, Sister" reboot and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Senator Bernie Sanders is joining Drew to chat about his new book. He's also joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to discuss local Vermont headlines and share some of his favorite Vermont-based small businesses.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew, Ross Mathews & Brooke Shields report a 60yo joining a pop punk band & the new hickey trend. Later, Drew & Brooke cook brown butter bowtie pasta.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: CBS Mornings" co-host Gayle King is joining Drew and Ross Mathews to hit the headlines, covering topics like the woman who found an unusual way to calm her nerves before a first kiss.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews dive into amazing animal headlines in an all-new Drew's News: Dr. Drew-Little Edition. Then, competing viewers face-off in a Mac N Cheese cook-off you won't want to miss!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Confess Fletch" star and avid dog lover Jon Hamm plays a rousing game of Pup Quiz with Drew and rescue dogs available for adoption.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Constance Wu gets candid with Drew about her radical honesty in her new collection of personal essays "Making A Scene," discussing everything from her mental health battle, sexual harassment and so much more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Chef Ronnie Woo is cooking up a storm with co-host Ross Mathews. Then, Drew and Ross discuss some of the latest and greatest headlines.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The most followed family on TikTok and stars of "The D'Amelio Show," Charli, Dixie, Heidi and Marc D'Amelio reveal what it's like sharing their life with over 224 million people around the world.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew takes the show on the road to join Katy Perry on-site at her Las Vegas residency, PLAY. Then, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Scream VI" stars Courteney Cox and Melissa Barrera are joining Drew in an all-new Drewber. Plus, "CBS Mornings" Tony Dokoupil joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: CBS Mornings Co-Hosts Gayle King, Tony Dokoupil and Nate Burleson join Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk breaking down everything.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Susan Sarandon joins Drew to chat about her new country music drama "Monarch." Plus, Susan joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk to help serve the news sunny side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Costume designer Patricia Field is telling Drew all about some of the famous looks she's created for "Sex and the City," "The Devil Wears Prada" and more.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew-crew member Danny Seo is back and sharing professional laundry tips with Drew andKerry Washington, including how to get makeup stains out of sheets.Drew and Ross Mathews are at the Drew's News desk and covering the hottest topics.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Almond and the Seahorse" star Rebel Wilson is joining Drew. HGTV's Lauren Makk is talking all about candle sticks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's a special edition of Drew's News on location at Comic Con with iconic actress and star of "Halloween Ends" Jamie Lee Curtis joining Drew at the news desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up and covering topics like the solutions you can try if you're a chronic late texter and the reason many people are opting for environmentally friendly burials.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Honk for Jesus" star Regina Hall joins Drew to chat. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Plus, In A Minute Drew and Regina surprise one lucky audience member with a big prize!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, it's an all-new Cookbook Club with "Half Baked Harvest" author Tieghan Gerard who is whipping up Finish Spicy Shrimp Tacos.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by rapper, actor, and entrepreneur Fat Joe at the news desk. Then, comedian Nick Kroll stops by to chat about his new stand-up comedy special, "Little Big Boy.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are back at the news desk and hitting the hottest headlines. Drew-crew member Pilar Valdes is sharing pro tips for making burgers. Horticulturist Chris Freimuth is sharing some easy flower tips.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News. Then, Celebrity Hair Stylist Chris Appleton is transforming three viewers with hair makeovers.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Justice Smith joins Drew and he's dishing about his latest film, "Dungeons and Dragons." Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Ali Landry at the Drew's News desk as they serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Emily in Paris" including Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo stop by to chat about the new season. The cast is also participating in an "Emily in Paris" style makeover for a deserving audience member.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Icon Martha Stewart and Drew tackle relationship red flags at the news desk and Martha reveals which young star she simply adores.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: An old friend from back in the hills is now an Elvis like singing idol. The Clampetts misunderstand the situation and decide to help Johnny get on his feet.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Johnny Poke's mother arrives from the Ozarks and Granny's matchmaking begins. Jed and Emma Poke come up with a plan to discourage her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale needs Jed to donate $190,000 to save the Beverly Hills Ballet but he has his hands full trying to keep Granny from heading back to the hills pushing all her stuff in a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the butler into staying on, posing as a boarder, so that he can teach the Clampetts how to be more civilized.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts still don't realize that Mr. Pinckney is their butler instead of their boarder. When he tries to leave them Granny thinks he trying to skip without paying his rent.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Hospitalized for nerves from dealing with the hillbillies Mrs. Drysdale threatens Mr. Drysdale to stay there until he gets rid of them and even sending for a specialist. Unfortunately, the Clampet clan is on their way to visit her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital. The Clampetts, unhappy with what they feel as the hospital's poor level of care, break her out and set her up in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May goes to Jed's studio to be in a movie and meet a potential husband.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Ellie May loses another suitor to Miss Jane in another case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts accidentally run into a beatnik he moves into the Clampett mansion, but neither he nor they know what to make of each other.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: As a favor to Jed Mr. Drysdale arranges for a playboy bank director (who normally only dates women half his age) to come court Granny, while Jed goes out with a beautiful woman who dates rich older men.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants Jed to find a wife and asks for Mr. Drysdale's help. He introduces Jed to Phyllis but learns too late she a gold digger and becomes alarmed when they head to the track. But it's Granny they need to worry about.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to become a "double naught" spy and converts the family's truck into his idea of a Bondmobile. But he becomes the unwitting pawn in another banker's scheme.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's biggest rival John Cushing succeeds in getting the Clampetts to transfer all of their money to his bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drydale's poodle Claude is to enter a dog show but gets sick right before. Granny offers to doctor the dog but Ellie Mae is concerned he doesn't know any tricks so she decides to help out with one of her own pets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: John Brewster, the oilman from Tulsa, is bringing his new bride to California for their honeymoon. Somehow the Clampetts get the idea that their backyard rustic cabin is the ideal place for the Brewsters to stay.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the arrival of spring, the Countess returns for Granny's new batch of spring tonic. Granny thinks she's looking for a new husband and that Jed is her perfect match.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale owns a building that houses a beatnik's club. He hopes to get rid of them when they can't pay their rent but they find a new a sponsor: Jed Clampett.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed soon regrets helping out the beatniks with their money problems when Jethro, Elly May (and even Granny!) decide to join them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is appalled to learn that Jed is going door-to-door peddling his services as a handyman. But then he's apoplectic when he discovers that Jed has been hired by a rival bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A long time employee of the Commerce Bank is being forcibly retired to make way for a new computer system. A chance meeting with the Clampetts gives him an idea about dealing with Mr. Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Beauregard Short arrives in Beverly Hills from back home. Everyone assumes he's looking for a wife and Jethro decides to show him how to be like him, an international playboy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Brewster, the oil man who made Jed a multi-millionaire, arrives in Beverly Hills with his wife planning to build their dream house. Jed and Granny think they have the perfect house in mind for their dream home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is determined to go back home even if she has to walk back all by herself. When she reaches Las Vegas she has second thoughts. Jethro gets arrested by an undercover cop.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she has a new way of getting rid of the Clampetts: talk Jed into donating their mansion to the city for an art museum. They agree, on the assumption that they are supposed to provide the artworks and not move out.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny confuses Mrs. Drysdale's forays into astrology with the practice of black magic. An intended gift for Ellie Mae from Mr. Drysdale only adds to the confusion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is anxious to become a new "Double Naught" spy and Mr. Drysdale gives him his own office. A bank robber hopes to con an unwitting Jethro into helping him get into the bank vault.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will the plan to backdoor Cameron come to fruition? And which houseguest will be the first sent to the jury house? Plus, what super surprises will be unleashed as comic week begins?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: What will Comic-Week bring to the BB game, and for the first time ever the Head of Household is up for grabs in the classic BB Comics. Who will ascend to heroic heights?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: With the Mighty Minute Men seemingly indestructible, will the Golden Power of Veto become their BB Kryptonite? Plus, will the BB Power of Multiplicity spell double trouble for the heroic Houseguests?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: What will happen at a 'super-charged' Veto Meeting? Will the Showmance be sacrificed? And which Houseguest will be Jury bound?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The surviving seven go to battle for Head of Household, but will they survive Johnny Mac the demented dentist? Plus, who will be the unlucky block buddies?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will the Power of Veto save one of the nominees? Plus, will Felicia put Cirie on Jag's nominee radar?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Will Blue be blindsided and sent to Jury? And which Houseguest will leave second? Because it's Double Eviction night, baby! A crazy, unpredictable, and heart pounding week's worth of gameplay, all in one night.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Tonight see all the begging, pleading, and strategizing that you didn't see durning the double; and with only five remaining winning Head of Household is more important than ever. Plus, two more house guests will hit the hot seat.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: The Power of Veto is on the line. But they'll have to survive the Swamp Slasher if they want the Power.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Either Felicia or Cirie will be the next sent to Jury. Will Jag get Matt on board to betray his friend Cirie? Plus, who will become the Head of Household and punch their ticket to Finale Night? And, what's been going down at the Jury House?

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: It's the last Veto competition of the season. Where the winner determines who has the sole vote to evict. Find out who joins Bowie Jane in the final three. Plus, BB 24 winner Taylor Hale returns to discuss the record breaking 100-day season.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Matt, Jag, and Bowie get an emotional surprise from home and look back on the craziest moments from this season.

programme.title: Big Brother
programme.desc: Bowie, Jag, and Matt go to battle in the three part final Head of Household competition. Who will emerge victorious and earn the power to cast the last eviction vote of BB 25? Plus, the Jury returns to choose the winner of the $750,000 grand prize.

programme.desc: Danny and Baez investigate the theft of the famous car that was driven in a classic film, now owned by Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When Danny and his family are threatened by Thomas Wilder (Louis Cancelmi), a serial killer Danny has been unable to apprehend, Linda’s concern intensifies over her husband’s job as well as the state of their marriage.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When a homicide case ends in a hung jury, Erin is forced to take over the case from her colleague, ADA Kelly Blake (Diane Neal), and with the help of DA investigator Anthony Abetemarco (Steve Schirripa), find a missing witness.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny is interrogated by the District Attorney’s investigator when his ex-partner is accused of planting evidence in order to wrap up a homicide case.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When a local mobster is gunned down in his car, Danny and Baez try to get information from the mob’s low-level errand boy they find tied up in the trunk before the gang retaliates.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When Frank’s first partner announces plans to publish a book filled with stories of their early days on the force, Frank worries about his personal stories being made public.

programme.title: Blue Bloods

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Danny must determine who murdered a man when multiple women who worked for him all take credit for it.

programme.desc: Marcus competes with other faculty members for the teacher-of-the-year award.

programme.desc: The school's biggest basketball star must pass Marcus' exam in order to keep playing.

programme.desc: Marcus swaps roles with Principal Martin, with disastrous results.

programme.desc: Marcus stages a one-man comedy benefit to raise money for the school.

programme.desc: Lorraine becomes extra nice when she suspects Daniel and Toni are putting her in a retirement home; Daniel and Michael give the Lieutenant some tips before his big date.

programme.title: Mann & Wife
programme.desc: Toni takes things too far when she helps Terri get ready for the school talent show; Daniel milks an injury so the family will take care of him.

programme.desc: Daniel and Michael go undercover in a comedy club to catch a criminal; Toni runs for the school board and goes against a mean rival.

programme.desc: Daniel's female sexual harassment training instructor makes a pass at him; Terri believes DJ's new girlfriend isn't good for him.

programme.desc: When Lorraine discovers racy notes, new perfume, and sneaky behavior, she thinks Toni is cheating on Daniel; Daniel goes to war with his next-door neighbor.

programme.desc: When Daniel is cleaning out his old car, he finds clues about who his real father is; Daniel's ex-wife tries to help DJ pass his driver's test.

programme.desc: Toni faces a moral dilemma when the administrators at her school decide to change the students' standardized test results; Hobbs' mother brings her new fiance for a visit.

programme.desc: MJ talks with a therapist about her issues with her mom and realizes there are more than she'd thought; Mike faces obstacles in his relationship; Asa an GG's resentments come to a head.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: GG's behavior at the pool party divides the crew; Asa has an outrageous business plan; GG and her sister fight.

programme.desc: The group gathers on a yacht; GG struggles to pull a launch party together; Asa, Reza and Mike start having doubts about Lilly.

programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Genética
programme.desc: Cuando Eddie y Jamie se involucran demasiado en un complicado caso de adopción entre los padres biológicos y los padres adoptivos, piden a Erin que los ayude a resolver el conflicto sin ir a la corte.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Several squad cars join together in pursuit of a pickup truck. Officers conduct a drug raid utilizing percussion grenades. A suspect wanted for numerous robberies flees from police in a sports car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A Special Operations Unit coordinates a city-wide “buy bust” sting designed to apprehend street level drug dealers. Officers join units in pursuit of a stolen SUV. An officer arrests two brothers for public intoxication.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it’s been in an accident. Obstacle after obstacle prevents a woman from fixing her janky vehicle. A young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest. A man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pursuit ends with the suspect on a roof, a driver calls deputies when a pedestrian loses his cool, and a relationship is jeopardized when a man results to illegal habits.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted suspect tries to hide from officers, a woman calls deputies to apprehend her hostile husband, and a passenger tries to outrun the police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The threat of a tasing is enough to slow a fleeing suspect, a heated argument between girlfriends leads to vehicular assault, and a man with weed in his car has no poker face.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a buy-bust sting operation after a hobbled dealer attempts to flee on foot. An elderly man is questioned after a report that he kicked a juvenile male in the face. A man is shot in the head by his female roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to curb a stolen vehicle, a parolee at large speeds away with a two-month-old in the car, and officers try to determine the details of a stabbing.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcycle with no license plate crashes while fleeing from Deputies. A woman driving a car with no windshield blames her ex-boyfriend. A gun is found hidden in a seat during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After crashing a car during a pursuit, the driver runs into a pho restaurant and is captured. A loitering suspect is spotted smoking a meth pipe. A drunk driver is pulled from a smoking wreck.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleet-footed deputy nabs a suspect on the run, officers responding to a domestic call are refused entry, and police try to ascertain the cause of a woman's hallucinations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man crashes his vehicle after losing control while attempting to evade the police. An eldery woman with an outstanding DUI warrant is arrested for hit and run. Officers discover methamphetamine while investigating two suspicious vehicles.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After chasing down a suspect on foot, officers retrieve a fully loaded revolver from his pants, and police respond to a call about a man wielding a knife outside a bar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disturbed naked man is spotted in a park covered in blood. Officers find a nude couple in a U-Haul truck. A traffic stop over a minor violation turns into a dangerous pursuit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Officer attempts to pull over a car which leads to a high speed pursuit. An Officer encounters an apartment fire. A man is hit by a vehicle in a trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman claims not to know her passengers, the search of a man's car leads to more charges, and a woman learns not to start vehicles with a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist runs a red light then runs from police, deputies arrest an uncooperative domestic violence suspect, and a low-speed chase ends in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers make an arrest in a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a man who’s suspiciously parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young man receives a wake-up call when police catch him breaking the law, and officers play peacemakers after a board game sparks a family feud.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man's addiction forces his family to call the police for help, a driver abandons his car and tries to evade officers on foot, and a man tries to conceal his illegal stash.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.desc: An eccentric genius is assassinated with the most unique weapon the CSIs have ever seen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a skydiver is murdered, the CSIs discover that he has more than 100 children and all of them are suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the sisters of a Miami sorority are knocked off one by one, the CSIs try to end the murder spree.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a neighborhood do-gooder is murdered, Horatio and the CSIs discover that he was planning to blow the whistle on something big.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the Miami Taunter kills again, Horatio comes face-to-face with the matriarch of the suspected killer's family, who may or may not help his investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a beloved tennis coach is nearly killed, Calleigh discovers a personal connection to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio uncovers a corruption scandal that pits him against an old adversary, and Calleigh makes a life-changing decision.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Llaman a Horatio y al equipo para investigar cuando encuentran a una prostituta muerta a puñaladas metida bajo una cama después de que se limpió el cuerpo.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando se revela que una red de laboratorios clandestinos está fabricando drogas mortales, Horatio y Speedle investigan la situación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y Speedle investigan cuando un ladrón y violador ha sido agredido sexualmente y atado con cintas a los pilares de su cama después de que lo mataron por asfixia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo se exponen a radiación mientras investigan un asesinato, lo que los lleva a un abogado ambientalista que se muere de envenenamiento por radiación.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Llaman a Horatio y al equipo para investigar el asesinato de un inmigrante de Europa del Este asesinado a puñaladas en una cabina de espectáculos eróticos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se apresuran para encontrar nuevas pruebas para un juicio en curso por asesinato para evitar la condena de un hombre posiblemente inocente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Se suponía que era un viaje encubierto de rutina al incinerador para deshacerse de pruebas de drogas, pero emboscan a los oficiales de policía.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El caso de Horatio de una mujer asesinada se ve comprometido cuando se involucran los agentes federales, que tienen su propio plan a seguir.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un ex-convicto que Horatio envió a la cárcel le pide que lo ayude a encontrar a su hijo desaparecido. Él encuentra marihuana mientras busca en la habitación del chico.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Estudiantes de todo el país van a Miami para pasar una semana de diversión bajo el sol. La fiesta se interrumpe cuando llaman al equipo de CSI a dos casos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Speedle y Delko están disfrutando de un lugar nocturno de moda en Miami, Club Descent, cuando la pirotecnia del DJ desencadena un incendio que arrasa al club.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se adentra en la cultura de las drogas después de que ocurre un brutal asesinato y una explosión casi fatal en la casa de un adicto a la metanfetamina.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando llaman a Horatio al Centro de Detención de West Miami para investigar a un preso asesinado, termina presenciando la fuga de tres presos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que una joven modelo es asesinada por un conductor que se da a la fuga, Horatio investiga al dueño del auto, que afirma que se lo prestó a los invitados a su fiesta.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: It’s mayhem at the Bronx Zoo. Mac, Danny, and new CSI Lindsay Hamilton look into the death of a man thrown to the tigers.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man found beaten to death at the San Gennaro festival leads Mac and Stella from the alleys of Mott Street to the power players of Wall Street.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac, Stella, and Lindsay discover why a young dancer with a winning lottery ticket in her pocket was thrown from the Roosevelt Bridge Island Tram.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The witness to a brutal elevator slaying has disappeared, and as the CSIs track her down they uncover the world of Manhattan “Lolitas.”

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Detective Mac Taylor and CSI Miami Lieutenant Horatio Caine follow the evidence from steamy Miami to steely New York as they close in on Henry Darius.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When murder comes to play at a high-stakes poker game, the CSIs work to find out why what they thought was a cheater’s revenge was misidentification.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In a New York doll “hospital”, Mac and Danny recover the corpse of the doll “doctor” beneath hundreds of body parts – doll body parts.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A rising roller derby star drops dead in the middle of a bout, and Mac and Stella come to the rink to investigate the death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A billionaire is found dead in his bedroom, when Danny begins to process the scene he trips a panic button, sealing himself in with the victim.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of two models at New York City’s hottest fashion show-- where all of the clothes consist of nothing but body paint.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a prank gone bad when a “subway surfer” met with the ultimate wipeout, but soon understand that the death was no accident.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella thinks she has finally caught a night off, but the host of a private art show she’s attending is skewered with a high tech bow and arrow.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Stella and Mac examine a case in which a man was shot to death as a result of one of New York City’s dangerous water gun wars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in her apartment building’s water tower, Mac and Lindsay must team up to find who her killer was.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Control P (S9 Ep11)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York se enfrenta a un misterio desconcertante cuando dos víctimas diferentes están vinculadas por la misma arma poco común.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Mentiras piadosas (S9 Ep12)
programme.desc: Cuando un querido oficial de policía de Nueva York fuera de servicio fallece en un robo, el equipo de CSI usa el arte del interrogatorio para doblegar a sus sospechosos y llegar a la verdad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El edificio 913 (S9 Ep13)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga cuando encuentran a un hombre enmascarado al pie de un rascacielos de mala fama conocido por su historia de muertes misteriosas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Oro blanco (S9 Ep14)
programme.desc: Cuando secuestran a un joven pizzero, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York debe determinar qué buscaban realmente los perpetradores.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Seth y Apep (S9 Ep15)
programme.desc: Mac y el equipo se asocian con D.B. Russell para aventajar a los secuestradores de Christine antes de que se les acabe el tiempo para salvarle la vida.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Mi sangriento Valentín (S9 Ep16)
programme.desc: En el Día de San Valentín, el detective Mac Taylor y el resto del equipo de CSI de Nueva York abordan tres retorcidas historias de amor que salieron mal.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La vida es hoy (S9 Ep17)
programme.desc: El malestar de la comunidad debido a un policía que mató a un hombre desarmado obliga a Mac y al equipo de CSI de Nueva York a actuar rápidamente para resolver el caso.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor descubre el cuerpo de una mujer en Brooklyn Heights, cuando su investigación lo lleva a un asesino en serie.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor y Danny Messer van bajo tierra y entran al mundo de los hombres que excavan bajo la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: La misión de los detectives Stella Bonasera y Danny Messer de encontrar a un violador brutal se ve obstaculizada, ya que la víctima no recuerda el ataque.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Una broma pesada se convierte en un misterio de un asesinato que abarca un siglo cuando un esqueleto colocado en un autobús turístico resulta ser auténtico.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI Investiga cuando el DJ más popular de Nueva York es encontrado muerto minutos antes de ser coronado campeón indiscutible de scratching.

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: CSI: New York

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Papote tiene un bar y emplea a menores que beban cerveza sin alcohol para atraer a más clientes. Por otro lado, Andrea contrató a Yamir, una médium, quien solo la toca con intenciones sexuales.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Edwin y Érica se pelean la custodia de una hija con un temperamento muy fuerte. Eduardo dejó a su hermano en México, años después se lo encuentra en Miami con otro género.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Marcos y Gabriela contratan un vientre de alquiler, pero notan que la gestora de la criatura no está bien de salud. Luis se casa con Edith para que lo reclame legalmente, pero ella se demora.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Se casaron, él la trajo a Miami y descubrió que estaba embarazada pero no de él. En otro caso, el hijo de Julia metió el pene en un camping gas para que la novia le hiciera sexo oral.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Samuel desapareció por un año y lo declararon muerto, pero regresa y descubre una nueva faceta de su esposa. Carlos era pareja de Sonia, pero se fue de casa con una de las hijas de ella.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Zully tiene una agencia de modelos de talla grande y despide a una de ellas por dar mal ejemplo. Claudia y su cuñada Penélope tienen diferencias personales y quieren vender un inmueble.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Alexa perdió su restaurante a causa de la influencia de Joshua, un joven que actúa con aires de superioridad. Isabella asistió con su novio a un club de intercambio de parejas y la violaron.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Mariana contrató una empresa de referidos para residencias de ancianos y ahora es un problema. Ketty dice que su hijo fue secuestrado por alienígenas que le dieron poder para salvar al mundo.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Escarlet salió embarazada y su esposo se enamoró de la asistente de su canal de YouTube. En otro caso, John tiene un tumor en la cabeza y quiere cambiarse de sexo antes de morir.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Dayami exige una orden de alejamiento de Emi, hijo de su expareja, quien contrademanda por abandono. Blanca trabaja de empleada doméstica del señor White, él la maltrata y la echó a la calle.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Lucca y Anisio se conocieron en una 'app' gay, pero Lucca tiene dos penes desarrollados. También, Pedro está casado y, aún así, buscaba sexo en Internet con hombres porque es bisexual.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Juan y Amelia tiene problemas de identidad de género. El padre se viste de mujer. También, Luz ha descubierto que su hermana y su cuñado escondieron el cadáver de su madre.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hermano de Víctor se suicidó, porque su novia publicó un video en el que anunció que se quitaría la vida. En otro caso, Bárbara no tiene papeles, estaba en el barco de Bilys y la deportaron.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Jéssica sufre de anorgasmia y buscó ayuda en Cornelio, que ofrece servicios cuestionables de meditación orgásmica. Ángel y Patricia se separaron y ambos reclaman ser dueños de una coreografía.

programme.title: Psycho Kitty

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier vows revenge after a pair of radio "shock jocks" embarrass him in a series of on-air pranks.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Jealous of Niles' position as the arts critic for a snobby magazine, Frasier goes all out in his bid to host a cultural program on his radio station.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz hires Bulldog to babysit her daughter, not realizing he's out to bulldoze her social life.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles crank their sibling rivalry up a notch when each believes the other is trying to steal his girlfriend.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After a family heirloom is linked to the Romanoff's, Frasier and Niles giddily assume they are descended from royalty.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: An erroneous report that Frasier has died motivates him to do a makeover on his life.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Lilith visits Seattle over Thanksgiving, Frederick conspires to reunite his parents.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Looped on pain medication for his ailing back, Frasier makes a startling announcement to Daphne.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Knowing Niles loves her, Daphne is forced to confront how she really feels about him.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After Frasier and Niles' New Year's plans fall through, they take a riotous road trip with Martin in his Winnebago.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's attempt to write a simple theme song for his show turns into a major production for he and Martin.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier's "dream date" with a former prom queen turns out to be a living nightmare.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Nobody believes Frasier when he claims to be dating a famous supermodel.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The sibling rivalry between Frasier and Niles reaches a fever pitch when they try and "top" each other's 65th birthday gift to their father, Martin.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles' envy and a series of mishaps may prevent Frasier from attending the festivities honoring him for his 1,000th radio show.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: To take Niles' mind off his marital problems, Frasier invites him on an Alaskan cruise -- but neglects to tell Niles he's also invited Maris as a "surprise.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The radio station hires a handsome new doctor to host a call-in medical show, but Frasier, nursing his male ego, is determined to find a flaw in his new colleague, who seems just a little "too perfect.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier is stunned when he learns the true identity of the man who is the father of Roz's baby.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier falls for a high-powered lawyer, whose successful career and take-charge attitude turns Frasier into a "wimp.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles' Halloween costume party becomes a comedy of errors when he mistakenly thinks that Daphne is pregnant -- and Frasier's the father.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: It's a Christmas to remember when Martin sings in a church pageant, Niles gets stuck in an elevator, and Frasier spills the beans about Roz's pregnancy to her unsuspecting mother.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Fed up with his cutthroat agent Bebe, Frasier soon learns the high price of hiring a "nice" agent to represent him in contract negotiations.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When, Frasier gets "dumped" by his high-powered girlfriend Sam, he makes a fool of himself trying to win her back.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne's attempts to lift Frasier's spirits by taking him to her favorite British pub backfires when Frasier decides to become a regular at "her" hangout.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: When Bulldog wrongfully takes credit for foiling a robbery and saving Roz's life, Frasier becomes determined to make Bulldog "come clean.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The discovery of an engagement ring hidden in their father's drawer leads Niles and Frasier to investigate Sherry's checkered past before Martin has a chance to "pop the question.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is shocked to discover that his trusted marriage counselor and Maris are having a torrid affair behind his back.

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que el hombre que ella admira se case con su hermana, una joven mexicana le dedica su pasión a la cocina, descubriendo que puede transmitir sus emociones a través de las comidas que prepara.

programme.title: Las fuerzas vivas
programme.desc: En un pueblo aislado se recibe la noticia de que ha estallado la revolución. Los dos partidos políticos que regentan la ciudad aprovechen para hacer campaña en favor de sus intereses.

programme.title: El Norteño Enamorado
programme.desc: Una ataviada historia que entreteje la opulencia de un hacendado, la codicia y envidia de quien quiere arrebatarle sus propiedades y en medio, las víctimas junto con quienes vienen a exigir justicia.

programme.title: Sicario
programme.desc: Jairo es un adolescente que vive en un mundo marginal, en un barrio repleto de drogas y asaltos. Hastiado de la pobreza y de su infierno familiar, se ve obligado a recurrir a la violencia.

programme.title: El Quijote
programme.desc: Don Quijote lucha contra unos rebaños de ovejas pensando que son ejércitos, detiene una oscura procesión pensando que están poseídas y, más tarde, encuentran una cuerda de cautivos a los que Don Quijote libera.

programme.title: Mañana serán hombres
programme.desc: El director de cine Enrique trabaja en la película "Yo morí a los veinte" con los jóvenes actores que ayudarán al argumento final de la película mediante sus historias.

programme.title: Los Alegres Aguilares
programme.desc: El aventurero Manuel se encuentra con Carlos, quien es casi idéntico a él. Uno es de familia rica y el otro no. Entonces Manuel le ofrece dinero a Carlos para que se haga pasar por él con una señorita con la cual no se quiere casar.

programme.title: El hijo de Dios
programme.desc: La historia de la vida de Jesús se cuenta desde su humilde nacimiento a través de sus enseñanzas, crucifixión y resurrección final.

programme.title: ¡Madre!
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence y Javier Bardem ofrecen actuaciones inolvidables en ¡Madre!, el elogiado trabajo de Darren Aronofsky. ¡Experimenta el suspenso psicológico visualmente deslumbrante que dejará tu corazón latiendo y te volará la cabeza!

programme.title: Aniquilación
programme.desc: Una bióloga (Natalie Portman) y un ex soldado (Oscar Isaac) dirigen una misión en un área de cuarentena misteriosa. “El Resplandor” un hermoso, pero letal mundo de paisajes mutados y criaturas que amenazan la vida en el mundo.

programme.title: Luna de porcelana
programme.desc: Un apasionado thriller de suspenso sobre un detective veterano en una pequeña ciudad de Florida, cuyo romance clandestino con una viuda joven y rica teje una telaraña de engaño, traición y asesinato.

programme.title: Señales de humo
programme.desc: Esta película, favorita de la crítica y el público, sigue a dos amigos muy diferentes en un viaje que nunca esperaban hacer. Combinando humor y emociones, explora la aventura de la amistad y el descubrimiento de nuevos mundos.

programme.title: El hijo de Dios
programme.desc: La historia de la vida de Jesús se cuenta desde su humilde nacimiento a través de sus enseñanzas, crucifixión y resurrección final.

programme.title: El juego del amor
programme.desc: La ciudad de Oregon es el escenario de este cuento de gente hipnotizada por el hechizo del amor. Del romántico Bradley (Greg Kinnear) a Harry (Morgan Freeman), un maestro con sabiduría y experiencia para orientar a los que le rodean.

programme.title: I.Q: fórmula para amar
programme.desc: Todo el mundo sabe que Einstein es un genio científico. Pero ¿qué hay de Einstein el casamentero? I.Q. pone esta noción a prueba y logra resultados ganadores en esta "divertida y cálida comedia romántica" que aplauden críticos y público.

programme.title: Cosas que diría con solo mirarla
programme.desc: Una historia compuesta de cinco tramas entrelazadas que se centran en un grupo de mujeres cuyas vidas, en el transcurso de unos pocos días, se enredan, se erosionan, se enriquecen y, finalmente, terminan por cambiar para siempre.

programme.title: Atlas de geografia humana
programme.desc: Fran, Rosa, Ana y Marisa deben armar un atlas de geografía. Sus vidas predecibles están a punto de cambiar a partir de ahora. Mientras trabajan en el atlas, experimentan el amor, el desamor, la infidelidad y la reconciliación.

programme.title: Solteras indisponibles
programme.desc: Tres niñas pequeñas, mejores amigas, conocen a un hechicero que les concede un deseo: tener la misma suerte en el amor. Varios años después, cada una de ellas tiene su propia vida hasta que un día un evento inesperado cambia sus destinos

programme.title: A primera vista
programme.desc: La historia, basada en la vida real, transcurre en Nueva York y comienza cuando una arquitecta se enamora de un carismático masajista ciego.

programme.title: Treintona, soltera y fantástica
programme.desc: Una mujer en sus treinta y tantos años se descubre a sí misma a través de la vida, el amor y el corazón roto.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: As the Mayan kingdom faces its decline, a young man is taken on a perilous journey to a world ruled by fear and oppression.

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: Sentencia de muerte
programme.desc: La superestrella de acción Jean-Claude van Damme (Contacto sangriento, Cyborg) es un veterano agente secreto que se hace pasar por un recluso en una peligrosa prisión estatal.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: En una tierra azotada por la plaga del siglo XXI, un hermoso Cyborg mitad humano tiene la información que puede salvar la civilización. ¡Pero solo la fortaleza y astucia de un guerrero solitario será capaz de salvar esos hechos importantes!

programme.title: Corrupción ferroviaria
programme.desc: Tras ser liberado de prisión, Leo Handler acepta un trabajo con su poderosamente influyente tío Frank. Leo pronto se ve arrastrado involuntariamente a un mundo de sabotaje, sobornos peligrosos, y hasta asesinato.

programme.title: Regreso al infierno
programme.desc: Cuando período de servicio en Irak llega a su fin, cuatro soldados estadounidenses se enteran de que están programados pare emprender una misión final. Una misión profética que cambiará eternamente el concepto que tenían hasta ahora de guerra.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2
programme.desc: El exconvicto reformado, Zequi (Omar Chaparro), enfrenta una crisis cuando su boda con Lucy (Martha Higareda) se cancela. Mientras intenta recuperar su amor, debe liderar a su escuela en un torneo crucial contra el exnovio perfecto de Lucy. ¡Caos total!

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Ladrón que roba ladrón
programme.desc: A un par de ladrones profesionales se les complica su plan para robar a un millonario, después de que los mejores miembros de su equipo habitual, abandonan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: El camino correcto
programme.desc: Arturo, un joven de la ciudad de El Verde Bonao en la República Dominicana rural, aprovecha las posibilidades que se le presentan al ir a la ciudad con la esperanza de ayudar a su madre, que acaba de ser diagnosticada con leucemia.

programme.title: La vida inmoral de la pareja ideal
programme.desc: Lucio y Martina, dos jóvenes que se conocen en los primeros años de preparatoria, con una química indescriptible, deciden comerse al mundo sin imaginar que el destino les tiene preparada una sorpresa que los separará.

programme.title: Cursed
programme.desc: El guionista y el director de Scream, vuelven a unirse para dar otro paseo por el lado oscuro. Luego de un ataque brutal de parte de una criatura terrorífica, dos hermanos exhiben comportamientos que los hacen creer que los ha mordido un hombre lobo.

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: The Woman in Black 2
programme.desc: 40 años después del primer embrujo en la Casa Eel Marsh, llega un grupo de niños evacuados desde Londres en medio de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, despertando al habitante más tenebroso de la casa.

programme.title: Carrie (2002)
programme.desc: Angela Bettis protagoniza esta adaptación de la clásica historia de terror de Stephen King. Carrie es una chica tímida con poderes telequinéticos y cuando sus torturadores la someten a un acto de humillación, todos aprenderán una lección mortal.

programme.title: Aulas peligrosas
programme.desc: Un grupo de estudiantes de secundaria de un pueblo descubre que el cuerpo docente está bajo el control de parásitos alienígenas. Con el guión inteligente de Kevin Williamson "Scream" y dirigida por Robert Rodriguez "From Dusk Till Dawn

programme.title: El mega tiburón contra Crocosaurus
programme.desc: El enorme tiburón prehistórico sobrevivió a su última batalla, y el mundo se ve amenazado nuevamente cuando se descubre un enemigo nuevo y más peligroso en las selvas de África.

programme.title: Toro Tiburón
programme.desc: Un tiburón hambriento comienza a alimentarse de los desprevenidos visitantes del lago en un pequeño pueblo de Texas.

programme.title: Pequeña gran vida
programme.desc: Gracias a un descubrimiento científico que permite encoger a los seres humanos, Paul y su esposa deciden hacerse pequeños y vivir en una comunidad miniatura. Paul sabe que algo grande les espera.

programme.title: A Toda Madre: A Toda Madre
programme.desc: Barbra Streisand y Seth Rogen son el dúo cómico perfecto al embarcarse en un gran viaje. Cuando Andy invita a su madre a un viaje de 8 días y 4800 kilómetros por el país, cuanto más lejos viajan, más cercanos se vuelven.

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: Action Point
programme.desc: La estrella de Jackass quiere llevarte a la comedia más loca de tu vida. D.C. y su loca pandilla de inadaptados harán hasta lo imposible cuando un baboso constructor planea cerrar su amado parque.

programme.title: Un amor de película
programme.desc: Bernardo es un productor de cine al borde de la bancarrota que decide convencer erróneamente a un director de cine famoso para que haga una mala película para poder ganar mucho dinero. Laura, su novia y agente, se convierte en su musa y confiada.

programme.title: Bull Durham
programme.desc: La temporada de béisbol tiene un comienzo difícil cuando el nuevo receptor de Bull Durham (Kevin Costner) y el joven y arrogante lanzador (Tim Robbins) compiten para conquistar a la sexy Susan Sarandon.

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película
programme.desc: Cuando se roban su televisión, Beavis y Butt-head emprenden camino en una hilarante película debut que le muestra a millones de fanáticos lo que ya saben: ¡Beavis y Butt-head son lo mejor!

programme.title: True Grit (1969)
programme.desc: The cantankerous Rooster is hired by a headstrong young girl (Kim Darby) to find the man who murdered her father and fled with the family savings.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land baron and his hired gun.

programme.title: Vera Cruz
programme.desc: In this epic Western, two shady mercenaries (Gary Cooper, Burt Lancaster) in Mexico during the 1866 revolution are hired to escort a Countess and her gold to the Mexican army in Vera Cruz and find themselves at odds with the army…and each other!

programme.title: Red River
programme.desc: John Wayne, Montgomery Clift and Walter Brennan give stellar performances in Howard Hawks' epic masterpiece as a self-made cattle baron (Wayne) and his adopted son (Clift) risk everything to drive their herd across the treacherous Chisholm Trail.

programme.title: Quigley Down Under
programme.desc: A self-assured American sharpshooter moves to Australia in search of employment and finds work for a despotic land baron in the Australian outback.

programme.title: King Creole
programme.desc: Elvis Presley gives Bourbon Street a new beat in King Creole. He plays a troubled youth whose singing sets the French Quarter rockin’.

programme.title: Blue Hawaii
programme.desc: His mother (Angela Lansbury) expects him to climb the corporate ladder. But Elvis would rather wear an aloha shirt than a white collar, so he goes to work as a tour guide. Lucky Elvis: his first customers are a car full of cuties.

programme.title: Clambake
programme.desc: The king of rock 'n' roll, Elvis Presley, is as a lonely million-heir who gives up his fortune and trades identities with a water ski instructor to learn about life from the bottom up in this musical romp! Bill Bixby and Shelley Fabares also star.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine, and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: Room At The Top
programme.desc: An ambitious young accountant schemes to wed a wealthy factory owner's daughter, despite falling in love with a married older woman.

programme.title: Moulin Rouge (1952)
programme.desc: Nominated for seven Academy Awards,® including Best Picture, and winner of two (1953, Best Art Direction-Set Decoration and Best Costume Design), this stunning biography of artist Henri de Toulouse-Lautrec is flawlessly directed by John Huston.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate decides to contest a jaywalking ticket she receives in Pixley.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer volunteers to train "Killer" a German Sheppard intended for sentry duty but turns Killer into a pussycat.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation, Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job. Of course, what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: In the first of the 3 part sea maneuvers, Gomer sneaks a cat aboard a Navy ship, unaware there is sensitive Petty Chief Officer who throws all Contraband overboard.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Part 2 of sea maneuvers has Pyle repeatedly goofing up Carter's mission.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Part 3 of Sea Maneuvers, has Carter challenging the Petty Chief Officer to a boxing match not knowing the Chief was the Fleet Champ with 37 knockouts.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: While sitting in a restaurant, Gomer witnesses an automobile accident between Sergeant Carter and another driver. When in court Gomer takes the oath seriously to tell the truth, the whole truth and nothing but the truth.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: When Gomer's cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomer's uniforms and then wanders the base, everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carter's sister. Carter is determined to break them up.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter assigns Pyle to drive his precious car back from the airport but the car is stolen immediately. Now Pyle has 24 hours to find it before Carter gets back and kills him.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer won't rest until he helps to reunite Sergeant Carter with Miss Bunny after they had a lovers spat.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer and his platoon engage in "war games" against a rival unit and Pvt. Pyle ends up captured and a prisoner of war.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter orders Pyle to take a week long furlough but instead of going back home to Mayberry, Pyle takes a civilian job on base so he can remain close to the Sergeant.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob finds himself in hot water after giving a television interview in which he unwittingly portrays his wife Laura as a nut.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob leaves the show after Mel rejects his script and is upset when Buddy and Sally don't join him.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura watch a scary movie only to find certain details of that movie coming true the following day.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
