programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Tensions flare as both Layton and Shelby become entangled in the love triangles. The guys dig up dirt on the girls in a challenge that potentially leaves the 11th girl eligible for the truth booth.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Tears are shed when Shelby brings her love triangle to an end. John tries to move in on Christina but keeps getting road blocked by Brandon, her no-match. The house is shocked to learn there is a virgin among them.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: A drunken mishap threatens to bring an end to the strongest couple in the house. Anthony swoops in on Layton's crush, Jenni. John finally makes a move on Christina. An unprecedented Matchup Ceremony leaves the house reeling.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The house is shocked after the last Matchup Ceremony. Jenni believes that Layton is her match but fears the wrath of a devastated Jessica. For one couple, the Truth Booth threatens to bring even more heartbreak.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The girls learn surprising information when their parents show up to interrogate the guys. When the parents leave, tensions between Layton and Anthony explode. The house learns that history can repeat itself.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: After another failed Matchup Ceremony, the house is ready for a fresh start. John believes he finally found his match in Jenni but the house isn't so sure. Ashley finds herself in a potentially explosive love triangle.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The battle between Dario and Layton over Ashley intensifies. Ellie turns her attention towards Nathan but Nathan is convinced that Christina is his perfect match. For Christina, the pressure of being the 11th girl is too much.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: Despite not being a match, Nathan explodes when Christina returns to Brandon. With just two Matchup Ceremonies left, Ashley's indecision between Layton and Dario could keep the house from winning it all.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: The house is faced with the final matchup ceremony and one switch to make. While the Truth Booth delivers some much needed answers, the question of the 11th girl puts the $1million in jeopardy.

programme.title: Are You The One?
programme.desc: 21 castmates reunite as host, Ryan Devlin, finds out if love lasted outside of Puerto Rico. All of the explosive drama that happened, after the final matchup ceremony lights went down, is revealed.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: After a name-calling scream fest, one cast member must choose between keeping their best friend out of The Jungle or having their teammate's back. TJ brings in a replacement team to make up for last week's deserters.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: During a rigorous challenge, one cast member's cheating ways could cost a team their fate in the game.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: Sleep-deprived and mentally broken, the house begins to divide as teams band together to plot against others.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex dispuesto a buscar venganza. La pool party se descontrola y surge el amor entre Renata y Sargento, lo que pone muy celosa a Norma. Montse y Spencer recuerdan los viejos tiempos y Brenda tiene un plan para vengarse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el quinto ex a la villa y es una gran sorpresa para varios. Spencer se va de cita y cree encontrar el amor. Rocío muestra que su venganza va en serio y coquetea con Ernesto y Oscar. Una maldición parece romperse en la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a reconquistar a su antigua pareja. Renata y Sargento van en serio, mientras que Rocío y Alejandro resuelven sus problemas por un rato. Ernesto sigue tratando de conquistar a Montse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Ocho solteros llegan a una villa en Tulum dispuestos a conocerse y ligar en unas vacaciones únicas. Hay una fiesta de blanco y luego pasean en cuatrimotos hasta un cenote. Llega el primer ex y una pareja conoce la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el segundo ex a la villa y de inmediato causa polémica. En la fiesta dorada, Montse se divierte con Alejandro. Norma y Sargento coquetean en la piscina, mientras que Alejandro se va de cita y trata de ligar con sus famosos masajes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex en la villa, que no le cae muy bien a todos, pero parece que habrá una reconciliación. Norma está celosa por Sargento y Renata. En la fiesta de togas, Montse y Ernesto coquetean. Sargento se altera y casi llega a los golpes.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex dispuesto a buscar venganza. La pool party se descontrola y surge el amor entre Renata y Sargento, lo que pone muy celosa a Norma. Montse y Spencer recuerdan los viejos tiempos y Brenda tiene un plan para vengarse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega el quinto ex a la villa y es una gran sorpresa para varios. Spencer se va de cita y cree encontrar el amor. Rocío muestra que su venganza va en serio y coquetea con Ernesto y Oscar. Una maldición parece romperse en la Master Suite.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a reconquistar a su antigua pareja. Renata y Sargento van en serio, mientras que Rocío y Alejandro resuelven sus problemas por un rato. Ernesto sigue tratando de conquistar a Montse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega otro ex y causa una revolución en la villa. Ernesto le pide a Montse que sea sincera con él y lo respete. Dianey y Elías se van de cita y le rompen el corazón a Spencer, quien encuentra consuelo muy rápido en Norma.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex y es alguien muy esperado, pero todo lo que ha ocurrido en las vacaciones impide la reconciliación. Spencer está decepcionado de Oscar y Norma tiene cruda moral. Renata ve con cariño a Elías y Sargento se pone celoso.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex que causa celos. Renata llora por Sargento, y Rocío discute otra vez con Alejandro y sobrepasa sus límites. Hay una votación sorpresa y una decisión que deja a todos en shock. Ernesto quiere dar el siguiente paso con Montse.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Llega a la villa un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a la reconciliación. Rocío no está interesada en Daniel, Renata y Sargento dejan que el amor fluya, y Montse y Ernesto anuncian su noviazgo. En la fiesta, Brenda completa su venganza.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: After achieving success in her younger years, brilliant septuagenarian Madeline Matlock uses her unassuming demeanor to make her way into a position at a prestigious law firm, Jacobson Moore.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Para celebrar el episodio número 500 de la serie El precio de la historia, Rick considera invertir capital en la capital de la nación. Para empezar, quiere adquirir un juego de cucharas de plata creadas por el patriota estadounidense Paul Revere.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: El futuro pinta bien para Gold & Silver con una pintura de Marc Chagall que le llama la atención a Rick. ¿Obtendrá esta obra maestra o acabará con un trato descolorido? Más tarde, Rick intenta comprar un anillo de la Serie Mundial de los Boston Red Sox.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick visita una galería de arte en el Hotel Venetian para ver las ilustraciones carísimas del clásico libro para niños "Donde viven los monstruos". Mientras tanto, en Gold & Silver, aparece una colección extraordinaria de discos de vinilo de los Beatles.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick cree que vale la pena comprar la primera moneda estadounidense, pero le va a costar una gran cantidad de dinero. Corey y Chum le ven futuro a una lonchera antigua de la serie animada "Los supersónicos" que llega deslizándose por el mostrador.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Un vendedor llega con un biciclo antiguo que pone a Rick a rodar: ¿decidirá que este trato vale la pena o le dará la vuelta? A Chum le toca el lado filoso del trato en el momento en que le vende una katana japonesa a Dana White, el presidente de la UFC.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick y Corey están inspirados con un discurso firmado por Martin Luther King. ¿Se unirán a la causa adquiriéndolo o se quedarán sin participar? Rick y Chum quieren un barco a control remoto, la versión miniatura del Crucero de la Selva de Disney.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Rick intenta conseguir una tarjeta autografiada del presidente Abraham Lincoln que no imagina no tener. Corey y Chum piensan en ofrecer mucho dinero por el mango de un driver de golf diseñado para el presidente Bill Clinton.

programme.title: El precio de la historia
programme.desc: Los expertos del empeño empiezan el episodio explosivamente cuando dos pistolas de retrocarga del siglo XVIII llegan a la tienda.

programme.title: Cuba, Embracing its Future
programme.desc: A leading site for fashion and legendary concerts, Havana is reconnecting with its past as a rhythmic hotspot, as is Santiago de Cuba, the birthplace of Cuban music. Experience "La Cubania," or, "The essence of Cuban identity.”

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los sueños son vitales. Palpitan en nuestros corazones, resuenan en nuestras mentes, nos impulsan hacia adelante hasta que convertimos nuestra imaginación en acción y damos aliento a nuestros destinos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El hogar debería ser un remanso de solaz, un refugio de los males externos. Pero ¿qué sucede cuando un terror paranormal lo invade, y el hogar se convierte en una prisión?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La fe es una fuerza poderosa. Puede proporcionar fuerza a los débiles, puede calmar los mares más tempestuosos. Pero, para la mayoría de las personas, la fe brinda respuestas que pueden ayudar a darle sentido a un mundo caótico.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La infancia debería ser una etapa de descubrimiento lúdico y de regocijo inocente. Pero ¿qué sucede cuando las realidades del reino paranormal traspasan sus barreras y despiertan el mal verdadero?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los investigadores paranormales buscan comprender lo sobrenatural y, con frecuencia, utilizan su conocimiento para ayudar a los demás. Pero ¿qué ocurre con estos expertos cuando el objeto de sus estudios se pone contra ellos?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Incluso los lugares más inofensivos pueden guardar las cicatrices de un pasado retorcido. El mal puede perdurar a través del tiempo, puede permanecer latente hasta que alguna persona ingenua o algún inocente se crucen en su camino sin darse cuenta.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El nacimiento y la muerte son etapas naturales de la vida. Sin embargo, algunas veces la muerte no es el capítulo final. A menudo, espíritus inquietos deambulan por la tierra buscando atormentar con su furia eterna a los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ayudar a los amigos a sobrellevar los tiempos difíciles puede ser agotador, en especial cuando esa dificultad tiene que ver con una enfermedad que pone en peligro la vida.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuenta la leyenda que un "fantasma" empujará a cualquiera que se atreva a sentarse en lo alto del mausoleo en el cementerio más antiguo de Wisconsin. Los compañeros de secundaria Nick, Krystian y Jon prueban esta teoría en la noche de Halloween.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Springfield, estado de Illinois, el Lake Club es un monumento a una época pasada: un salón de baile donde multitud de personas alguna vez prosperaron, acompañados de los sonidos del jazz clásico.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los espiritistas algunas veces hablan sobre cierta región de la existencia donde los espíritus vagan libres de cuerpos materiales, y ellos la llaman “la otra vida”. En las costas de West Bay Lake, estado de Wisconsin.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En este mundo, la verdadera maldad existe. Acecha dentro de las sombras más oscuras, así como en los lugares más sencillos. Se disfraza con muchas máscaras para engañarnos y, finalmente, destruirnos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La ciencia moderna nos afirma que, en el nivel más simple, el mundo material no es más que energía y que todos estamos conectados de forma física con el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ron y Nancy están convencidos de que su nuevo hogar es demasiado bueno para ser verdad: la histórica casa Baltimore se adapta de forma ideal a su presupuesto, y además, es tan grande como para alojar a su gran familia.

programme.title: Agenda Privada
programme.desc: Si de lujos se trata, Charlie sabe que la Ciudad de México tiene mucho qué ofrecer, por lo que está dispuesto a pasar un fin de semana inolvidable en el hotel St. Regis.

programme.title: Agenda Privada
programme.desc: Como es costumbre, Charlie llega a Cabo San Lucas para reservar su hospedaje en uno de los hoteles más exclusivos. Esta vez, las actividades extremas no se hacen esperar.

programme.title: Agenda Privada
programme.desc: Las actividades en la Baja Sur sorprenden a Charlie, pues vive experiencias inimaginables en tierra y en mar; desde dar un paseo montado en un camello, hasta nadar con delfines.

programme.title: Agenda Privada
programme.desc: La Riviera Maya es una zona que invita a recordar la cultura que da nombre al sitio, por lo que Charlie no deja esto de lado y se adentra a una comunidad para conocer la comida maya.

programme.title: Agenda Privada
programme.desc: Charlie se da tiempo para conocer un lado imperdible de Barcelona: su cultura, recorriendo el Barrio Gótico y, por supuesto, degustando su gastronomía.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Jerusalén es una ciudad santa para judíos, cristianos y musulmanes, y cada uno tiene su piedra sagrada aquí: el Muro de los Lamentos, la Piedra del Santo Sepulcro y la Roca debajo de la famosa cúpula de oro.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Este es un retrato real de Mayotte, una isla donde los pequeños pueblos viven en paz con costumbres ancestrales y donde abunda la creatividad de la naturaleza.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony emprende un peregrinaje a Sídney, Australia, para disfrutar de una comida preparada por uno de los mejores chefs del mundo: Tetsuya Wakuda.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Melbourne, Australia, tiene amantes de la comida fuertes, amables y excéntricos: la clase de gente de Tony. Buscando a los proscritos de la comida.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony se propone buscar el verdadero Singapur, con sus restaurantes multiculturales y mercados de alimentos. Prueba diversos platillos, explora el mercado de Geyland Serai, viaja en el limpio y eficiente metro local.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Enriquecidos por su experiencia, aquellos que transportan la ciudad de Nueva York revelan sus lugares favoritos, sabiduría, consejos y secretos a la ciudad del movimiento perpetuo que conocen tan bien.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Black wants to leave his fiance Justine to be with a woman named Star. But he's about to find out that Star is actually a man. Then, Jay has to reveal to Brittany the shocking secret that he slept with her sister Donna.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Je’nier has a wild secret to share with Preston. Then, it’s Nikki and Nikky going after one man! Will Nikki or Nikky win Kevin’s heart? Does Kevin deserve either woman's love?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Khloe is ready to reveal to Jamal that she may not be the woman he thinks she is. Nick is here to confront his wife Barbara and the man she’s been sleeping with, Jason. Plus, Danielle is ready to confront her friend Amy for spreading lies.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: It’s the battle of the exes! Tony fights to get her ex-lover back. Richard reveals to his wife that he’s had an affair, and watches as Lisa, his ex-lover, fights to get him back!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Mr. Panama is back and still cannot decide which girl he wants to be with. Next Chauntey's cheating with her lover's brother! Later Chris is back and he's still trying to play Dee and Rhonda at the same time.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve will put Brittany's sister Jami and boyfriend Luis on the lie detector test to find out if Luis coerced Jami into having sex. Then, did Cassandra sleep with her husband Greg's brother Collin? Is Collin their child's father?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: According to Dennis, ex-girlfriend Kendal refuses to let him go and keeps him around by lying about being pregnant. He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve's DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Jessica can't make sense of her on again off again relationship with Wade and it's starting to drive her crazy. Wade however claims he's had nothing to do with Jessica and she's been spreading lies and stalking him for years.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: After months of begging and pleading, Latoya forgave Justice for cheating. But now they’re back to test him for the same thing! Then, James could be too good to be true – is he cheating on Santa? What will the lie detector tests say?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: John and his wife Yolanda believe Keia is trying to trap him with someone else's baby because she's obsessed with him! Plus, after a wild New Year's Eve bash, whose baby did Payge conceive? Is it Floyd, Phillip or neither man?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Cheaters, cheaters and more cheaters! Today’s MAURY is full of drama, shock and temptation. These guests simply can’t keep their hands to themselves when faced with a tempting situation and find themselves in deep trouble with their partners!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Nick denies Chantelle's baby, but she wants to prove he's the father and make him pay up. Mario's mother Evette says she went "undercover" to prove that Sierra cheated on her son and that he is not her baby's father! What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Nicky and Carissa have been on and off for 8-years, and Donald thinks she's still seeing Nicky. Then Chastity suffered a miscarriage and discovered Sean cheated, but now he says she's cheating with his relatives!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Tras sobrevivir a una loca persecución en coche, perder la pierna y estar en coma a causa de su esposo, Portia finalmente lo confrontará. No admitirá la culpa, pero hoy Steve está ayudando a Portia a hacerse oír.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Naomi, de 17 años, ha cambiado repentinamente de actitud y tiene la misión de ser madre. Sus padres, Leeanders y April, necesitan que Steve intervenga.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jennifer se fue de casa para protegerse de su padrastro Allen. 15 años después, su madre quiere una segunda oportunidad, pero Jennifer tiene dudas. ¿Puede Steve ayudar a componer esta familia destruida?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lanikka está harta de los abusos de su novio Malcom. Después, los celos de Tim han destrozado su familia, pero ahora está desesperado por recuperarlos, ¿Tiffany lo dejará definitivamente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desde que Chris tenía 3 meses, su abuela Anne lo crió y le dijo que su madre Hollie era abusiva y que trató de lastimarlo. Ahora Chris y Hollie se van a conocer por primera vez en nuestro escenario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: LaShawna y su novio James sabrán si su amiga Coral lastimó a su hijo hace años. También admitirá que ella le fue infiel con Coral. ¿Cómo reaccionará él cuando descubra otro bombazo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Buddy pasa sus días fumando y jugando a los videojuegos, en lugar de mantener a su familia. Su novia Holly trabaja para mantenerlos a todos, incluyendo a su hijo que tiene necesidades especiales, ¡pero está harta!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lainie y Justin tienen un bebé de 9 meses juntos. Justin lastima a Lainie porque cree que ella es infiel. ¿Pero cómo reaccionará Steve cuando se enfrente a Justin?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Quién es responsable del bienestar del pequeño Noel? Todo el mundo puede negar las acusaciones, pero alguien sabe qué pasó, y Steve va a obtener explicaciones.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kendra tiene la misión de salvarla de su novio tóxico Chris. A los 17 años, Kendra está embarazada de su sexto hijo. Kendra lo ha intentado casi todo, incluso echarlo de su casa, pero no solamente se defendió, sino que también golpeó a Kendra.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sheroya tiene 17 años y se esfuerza por criar a 2 niños mientras sale de fiesta sin parar. Su novio Malcolm suele ser infiel y la maltrata verbalmente. Steve tiene mucho trabajo por delante con esta pareja, pero ¿alguno de ellos despertará?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Everett tocó a la hija de su novia Michelle? Su ex Robert dice que su hija de 7 años lo contó. ¡Everett se someterá a una prueba con el detector de mentiras para desmentirlo! ¡No te pierdas estos resultados impactantes!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Marlo tocó a su hija con Sandra cuando ella tenía 7 años? Ha evitado confrontarla durante casi 10 años, pero hoy, Sandra no se irá hasta que no se sepa la verdad y se haga justicia por su hija.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Steve está celebrando otra reunión de chicas adolescentes para tratar los problemas más importantes a los que se pueden enfrentar todas las adolescentes, incluyendo el uso de drogas, el abuso físico y los agresores en Internet.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario lleva a Iván para hablar con el doctor. Le explica lo que ha pasado con su hijo y con la bebida de Jimena. La enfermera entra de improviso, informando que al niño le dio un paro.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Caridad recrimina a Rosaura por haber actuado en la forma que lo hizo en la boda de Eva. Luis Mario pregunta si todo es verdad y Rosaura le dice que si. Éll le dice que tiene que casarse con Eva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura sigue pidiéndole a Eduarda que se arrodille para que le devuelva todo. Luisana se confiesa con Fernando sobre sus fracasos amorosos con Bruno y con Silvia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le devuelve a Luis Mario las tierras y la casa. Él la besa, aunque ella al principio se niega pero al final accede. Eduarda y Camelia se golpean y llega Gabriel a enterarse de todo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario rechaza a Eva y le dice que se siente mal por lo de su hermana. Cuando se queda solo, piensa en los besos Rosaura, no de Eva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda zarandea tanto a Jimena que la hace caer y comienza a perder sangre. Luisana pide que llamen a la ambulancia. La fiscal no acepta la declaración de Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Todos en el hospital están nerviosos. Aparece una enfermera y le preguntan. Ella dice que la operación fue un éxito y que la madre está muy bien pero el niño no habla.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Rosaura le preguntan al doctor si el niño de Iván y Jimena va a vivir. Las muchachas comienzan a a preguntarle cosas a Jimena y ella les cuenta lo del adelanto del parto.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario lleva a Iván para hablar con el doctor. Le explica lo que ha pasado con su hijo y con la bebida de Jimena. La enfermera entra de improviso, informando que al niño le dio un paro.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura y Luis Mario le dicen a Jimena que el bebé se murió. Patricio y Camelia siguen preparando la trampa para casarse con Rosaura. Jimena está muy mal, entonces Rosaura y Luis Mario tratan de calmarla.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Eva se besan y hablan de su hijo. Maximiliano le dice a Rosaura que el la ama y quiere casarse con ella, que él es libre, no como Luis Mario, quien está casado y no podrá hacerla su esposa.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario besa a Rosaura y luego la deja, empujándola y llamándola engreída y minina. Fernando le cuenta a Bruno todo lo que pasó. Bruno le dice que esa es su casa y ellos su familia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Iván le reclama a Patricio lo de Karina y él le da un puño, tirándolo al suelo. Minerva lo llama cobarde y Iván también lo llama cobarde. Camelia se ríe y se va. Ni Eduarda ni Jimena quieren comer.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda se desespera en el momento en que se entera que Rosaura y Patricio se van a casar, razón por la cual va al estudio en busca de un revolver para matar Rosaura o al Patricio.

programme.title: ONE Vault
programme.desc: John Lineker's massive knockout capped off ONE on TNT III in style.

programme.title: ONE Vault
programme.desc: Both these fights from ONE: Full Blast provided plenty of non-stop MMA action.

programme.title: ONE Vault

programme.title: ONE Vault
programme.desc: Experience all the action from the world’s largest martial arts organization on ONE Championship TV, featuring MMA, Muay Thai, kickboxing, and more! Check out the best fighters on the planet, weekly events, and behind-the-scenes originals!

programme.title: ONE Vault
programme.desc: Some of MMA's brightest female stars put on a thrilling show at ONE: Battleground.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Despite his furious attempts, Luffy struggles to land a blow against Gecko Moria, but Sanji fares much better in his passionate attempt to defeat Nami's beastly abductor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji takes a beating when his opponent suddenly turns invisible, Luffy finally manages to land a blow in his battle with Gecko Moria, and Usopp uses fire to ward off a zombie bear!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After getting the stuffing beat out of him by a zombie teddy bear, Usopp summons his sharp-shooting alter ego to help him discover the secret to defeating Perona!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp reaches deep into his devious bag of tricks to even the odds in his battle with Perona. Meanwhile, Luffy can't lay a finger on Gecko Moria, and a zombie is less than gentlemanly in his battle with Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Franky and Brook watch in awe, Zorro and the zombie samurai wage a sword-slinging battle the likes of which the world has never seen before!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper can no longer contain his fury over Dr. Hogback's evil treatment of his zombie slaves. Meanwhile, Luffy prepares to face the zombie who's wearing his shadow!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Moria's mansion is reduced to ruins as the zombie with Luffy's shadow stalks the Straw Hats! As the walls come tumbling down, Chopper puts the hurt on Hogback, and Nami vanishes right before Sanji's eyes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: One by one, the Straw Hats attack Oars, but the monstrous zombie appears too powerful to be defeated. Luffy's got his sights set on Moria, but he'd better hurry if he wants to save his crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami wakes up just in time to find out she's about to marry a zombie, but the special occasion is interrupted by very jealous warthog!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami attempts to track down some missing treasure, Brook searches the kitchen for a mystery ingredient, and a heroic team effort topples Oars!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami has a horrifying run in with Bartholomew Kuma, Perona becomes the latest lady to vanish, and Chopper, Franky, and Usopp team up to strike a blow against Oars!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kuma has an upsetting message for Moria, Luffy loses track of his intended target, and Zoro attempts to harness the power of a new sword during his battle with Oars!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook arrives with the salt needed to stop Oars, but the monster shows off some special new abilities. Deep in the forest, Luffy makes some new friends who help him power up!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook joins the fight as the Straw Hats valiantly try to hold off Oars and Moria until Luffy returns. Unfortunately, even their combined powers are no match for these evil enemies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Oars and Moria ruthlessly pummel the badly beaten Straw Hats. The situation looks bleak until the shocking arrival of Nightmare Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After Luffy's shadow power disappears, he'll need help from rest of the Straw Hats to land a devastating finishing blow in his battle against Oars.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Moria gobbles up every shadow in sight to power up for a final showdown with Luffy. Can the Straw Hats save the day before the dawn reduces them all to ashes!?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle between Luffy and Moria reaches its epic end, and the gargantuan shadow of the towering brute known as Kuma causes a panic on the island!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kuma is ordered by the World Government to obliterate every living being on the island, but the Straw Hats – battered as they may be – refuse to go down without a fight!

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: A former Georgia boxer fights to keep a lifetime of stockpiled stuff but his wife is fed up.

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Going Medieval

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: All Jazzed Up
programme.desc: A drummer's pad with a legendary autograph fetches a fair price while three unopened Prohibition-era whiskey bottles set Jimmie reeling.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Seat of Horns
programme.desc: The guys get blown away when they check out an old hunting rifle thought to have belonged to George Washington, and Gerard shows up with a chair made out of cattle horns.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Gone with the Pawn

programme.desc: Jimmie challenges the staff to compete in a Halloween costume contest. Later, a customer brings in a 1967 Cadillac Fleetwood hearse.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Shotgun Bowling

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank pick a house that's stacked to the ceiling with rare toys. Mike adds to his King Kong collection while Frank drops a bundle on a rare train set.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, Mike and Frank pick in some unique places including a funeral home and a prosthetic limb factory.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: At a folk art museum, Mike and Frank discover an attic and two barns that are overflowing with one-of-a-kind pieces.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The Pickers visit Tom whose amazing collection of architectural salvage includes a vintage theater marquee and rare opera house relics.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Shaken and Stirred

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.desc: Imagine yourself floating freely in a clear, tropical ocean. Through this liquid universe moves Earth’s largest, most majestic and graceful creatures. You are immersed in the mystical blue world of humpback whales, sperm whales, and blue whales.

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: Every year animals migrate to the Canadian East. These incredible journeys bring humpback whales from the tropics to the Bay of Fundy to feed. They also bring Canada geese from the southern United States to Nova Scotia to breed.

programme.title: Wild Asia
programme.desc: A year in the life of the temperate forest of Japan, where animals and plants must adapt to suit the variations of the climate in order to survive.

programme.title: Great Horses of the World

programme.title: Epic Safari Destinations

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Thailand: The Wild Heart
programme.desc: Thailand is a land of extremes. A country shaped by wild forces, where animals face tough challenges to survive. Tropical rainforests, primeval caves, mangrove swamps, and rocky shorelines provide homes for remarkable creatures.

programme.title: Deadly Australians
programme.desc: From the terrifying jaws of the world's largest flesh-eating sharks to an eclectic collection of marine assassins that wield lethal chemical weapons, lurking just beneath the surface of Australia's oceans is a battleground of cold-blooded killers.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote finds a mysterious water anole and explains the difference between a cottonmouth and a water snake.

programme.title: Wildest Latin America: Pantanal: Brazil's Wild Heart

programme.title: Secret Life of the Wombat

programme.title: Chasing Monsters

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Alan returns from China and gives Justin and Mike a cold dose of reality about the jade they're mining. As snow threatens to shut down the mine, the crew starts up a night shift under lights to beat the winter deadline.

programme.title: Jade Fever

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Winter arrives at Dynasty and the crew struggles to mine up to the last possible minute. Claudia and Robin are worried Justin and Mike are pushing themselves too hard.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Funding her mining season alone and determined to start her hunt for jade a month early, Claudia is forced to re-think her strategy when snow and high water stop the crew in their tracks.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Robin follows a hunch to a new site at an old claim, while Josh's high expectations and short fuse test Gary's patience.

programme.title: Jade Fever
programme.desc: Guy struggles with the excavator to expose a massive find while Josh's dissatisfaction with his position in the crew causes family conflicts to boil over.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Icy rocks and unpredictable waters force the remaining participants to decide if their desperate need for fat is worth taking dangerous risks. One participant is faced with a deadly predator threat and braces to fight for his life.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: As the participants march deeper into winter, it becomes increasingly difficult to procure food. One participant gets a lucky break, but soon discovers things aren't what they seem.

programme.title: I Survived . . .
programme.desc: A young mother is attacked and strangled by a man she meets at a party. A snowmobiler survives a series of avalanches but loses eight of his friends.

programme.title: I Survived . . .

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: The South Pacific, a place so endearing in terms of the people, the fishing, and the diving, no place in the region can compare to Matava Resort on Kadavu Island.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: To the angling world, The U.S. Virgin Islands are famous. St. Thomas is strongly considered one of the hottest blue marlin fishing grounds in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Anglers Digest
programme.desc: On the Pacific side of Panama sits and island that has been lost to the test of time… Cebaco…. that is, until James Weise was marlin fishing near it years ago and discovered an untouched fishery.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: We join Alton Jones and Tom Redington on the water where they each share insight into fishing and electronics in this episode of Americana Outdoors.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: The Bass Pro Shops and Cabelas National Walleye Tour offers premier, tour-level competition for walleye anglers across the North. Each event features the biggest names in walleye fishing as they compete for big prizes while targeting big WALLEYE.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: How do Pros figure out what they will do at any given moment on the water? We’ll join Frank Talley, Keith Combs, and Clark Wendlandt as they breakdown the water, weather, and fishing conditions to find out how to trigger largemouth bass to bite.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: In this episode of Americana Outdoors we meet up with Wade Middleton as he shares his thoughts on Turkey hunting and why he enjoys it so much.

programme.title: Fishing Impossible

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.desc: When Ronnie takes the fall for losing their previous repo, Carlos tries to make amends.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: It's a brand new start for the Operation Repo team when Lou bets big on a high-risk opportunity and sets up shop in Las Vegas! But first, Ronnie and Froy must wrangle a wrestling ring from a Lucha Libre school.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team is ahead of schedule on their Vegas mission, but will it all be derailed when Froy brings unwanted trouble back to the office? Also, Ronnie and Froy run into an unexpected dilemma when a husband's better halves take the reins.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: An Elvis impersonator gets Matt and Ronnie all shook up, and a ventriloquist's dummy has a nasty attitude that gets on Sonia's bad side. When Froy goes missing, Lou has to pick up the slack in a repo that goes terribly wrong.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Fuming over Froy's departure, Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client and packs his bags to return to LA.? Down two repo men, the pressure is on Ronnie and Carlos, who interrupts a couple in the middle of their less-than-holy matrimony.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.desc: Jack takes his family on Christmas vacation to an old favorite cabin for some tech-free festive fun.

programme.desc: Romantic, small-town girl Holly, and realist, career-driven, Chris aren't a likely pair, but when 'matched' together by Holly's all-knowing great-aunt, they don't seem to have much of a choice.

programme.title: A Christmas Eve Miracle
programme.desc: After wondering what her life would be without children, a mother is granted her Christmas wish!

programme.title: A Christmas Mystery
programme.desc: When a reporter discovers that her late mother had been receiving Christmas cards from a secret admirer, she decides to track him down. In the process, she'll discover a family secret more dangerous than she could have ever imagined.

programme.title: A Christmas Switch
programme.desc: Two women magically switch bodies during the holidays and teach each other valuable lessons about family, love, and Christmas cheer.

programme.title: A Fall City Christmas
programme.desc: With nowhere to go, a recently paroled thief, Jon Price, is forced to return to his small hometown right before Christmas. Unexpectedly, he meets a struggling, single mother who lives her life with hope and shows him kindness through gentle compassion.

programme.title: A New Christmas
programme.desc: A woman visiting New York City at Christmas helps a grieving man rediscover the magic of the holidays.

programme.title: Love and Monsters

programme.title: Spontaneous
programme.desc: Get ready for the most outrageous coming-of-age love story about growing up...and blowing up! When students in their school begin exploding (literally...), seniors Mara and Dylan struggle to survive in a world where each moment may be their last.

programme.title: Jennifer´s Body
programme.desc: A possessed cheerleader gains an appetite for her male classmates.

programme.desc: Experts stress health and physical fitness with the models, and a nasty incident involving two of the girls and some baked goods leads to confrontation and a divided house.

programme.desc: A look back on the highlights, low-lights, and previously unseen footage from the season as we race toward the climactic crowning of America's Next Drag Superstar.

programme.desc: Season 6 premieres with 14 new queens competing to become America's Next Drag Superstar. But first they must face a death-defying photoshoot. With guest judge Adam Lambert and photographer Mike Ruiz.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The first day of the adventure begins, with 10 people prepared to head out into unknown wilderness and survive for as long as they can, in total isolation.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: After several days, the participants attempt to acclimate to their new environment and make order out of chaos. One survivalist proves incredibly skillful and finds success.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When the teams foils the robbery of an armored car filled with money from the infamous D.B Cooper heist, they call on Agent Roger Bloom for his help.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team hope they hit the jackpot when they investigate the theft of scratch-off lottery tickets.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team search for a missing shipment of deady firearms when one of the weapons is responsible for random murders across the city.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team search for a serial killer who is targeting men that hire prostitutes.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team are put in the limelight when they search for jewels that go missing during an awards braodcast and Larry returns from his adventure.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team investigate the mysterious death of two men who were part of a group of friends that had been sexually abused by one of their teachers.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: After Charlie and Amita get married, the team turns its attention to tracking down Don's gun after it goes missing.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Agent Colby Granger lands in prison after the discovery that he was a mole within the FBI, but he escapes, and it's up to Don and his team to track him down and uncover the truth on the fourth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A typical morning at a coffee shop turns into a nightmare when a car collides into it, leaving one person dead and many injured. But what appears to be a car's accidental loss of control is soon exposed to be more.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A series of secrets and blackmail involving a young, up and coming actor are exposed when Don and his team investigate the murder of a young woman in his Hollywood Hills mansion.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: After recognizing numerological patterns in the Bible verses that the killer leaves behind, Don and his team are able to track the killer's movements but are one step behind when a gripping twist brings the chase to an end.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: A bank for the rich and powerful is robbed but the stolen contents of the safety deposit boxes are being liquidated and donated to charities, and it's up to Don and Charlie to uncover the true motivation behind the humanitarian thief.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don feels responsible for the death of a participant in the Witness Protection Program after she is gunned down in her home.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team investigate the secret world of alternate reality games after a man plunges to his death while participating in one such game. Amita's life is in danger when her hidden gaming ability becomes the key to tracking down the killer.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Mario Puzo's The Godfather Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone
programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: A chilling portrait of the Corleone family's rise and near fall from power in America along with balancing the story of the Sicilian clan's ugly crime business in which they are engaged.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: April Fool's Day
programme.desc: When Muffy St. John invited her college friends up to her parents’ secluded island home for the time of their lives, she just forgot to tell them it might be the last time of their lives.

programme.title: The Keep
programme.desc: WWII German soldiers try to defend a Rumanian mountain pass by establishing headquarters in an ancient fortress - despite warnings about a strange presence inside.

programme.title: Mimic
programme.desc: From Oscar winning director Guillermo del Toro (THE SHAPE OF WATER) comes the ultimate battle between man and nature. Once a miracle of genetic engineering, what was created in the lab has evolved to mimic the most dangerous predator of all—humans.

programme.title: Rollerball
programme.desc: Jonathan Cross (Chris Klein) is an all-American hotshot, the most popular player in the fastest and most extreme sport of all time: Rollerball.

programme.title: The Crow: Salvation
programme.desc: Alex Corvis returns to the world of the living to solve the murder of a young woman that he was wrongly accused of.

programme.title: April Fool's Day
programme.desc: When Muffy St. John invited her college friends up to her parents’ secluded island home for the time of their lives, she just forgot to tell them it might be the last time of their lives.

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Based on the classic 1868 novel about love, family and the female spirit, Louisa May Alcott tells the domestic saga of the March family.

programme.title: Ghost
programme.desc: Patrick Swayze plays a ghost who teams with a psychic (Whoopi Goldberg) to uncover the truth behind his murder — and to rescue his sweetheart (Demi Moore) from a similar fate.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: Boogie Nights
programme.desc: In this dark, comic drama, a gullible teenager takes a turbulent journey through the worlds of pornography, disco and fleeting stardom in the '70s, when drugs were in vogue, fashion was in flux and the party never seemed to stop.

programme.title: Capote
programme.desc: In 1959, Truman Capote learns about the horrific and senseless murder of a family of four in Kansas. As he digs deeper into the story, he is inspired to expand the project into what would be his greatest work, In Cold Blood.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, a Gelfling embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal, and to restore order to his world.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah must solve a labyrinth to rescue her baby brother when he is taken by the Goblin King.

programme.title: Love and Monsters
programme.desc: In a monster-infested world, Joel (Dylan O'Brien) learns his high school sweetheart (Jessica Henwick) is just 80 miles away. Now, Joel must discover his inner hero, facing unknown dangers on the impossible journey to be with the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: The Monster Squad
programme.desc: Young kids form a club that is devoted to monsters but soon get more than they bargained for when Dracula adjourns to Earth, with Frankenstein's Monster, Wolfman, Mummy, and the Gillman.

programme.title: Beauty And The Beast
programme.desc: A struggling merchant stumbles upon the magical domain of the fearsome Beast, who sentences him to death for stealing a rose. As Belle valiantly attempts to release the Beast from his curse, the two discover that an unlikely bond blooms… true love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Come join The Addams Family for the most hilarious scarefest of this season or any other! When long-lost Uncle Fester reappears after twenty-five years in the Bermuda Triangle, Gomez and Morticia plan a celebration to wake the dead.

programme.title: Addams Family Values
programme.desc: The family’s future grows bleak when the no-good nanny marries Fester and has the kids shipped off to summer camp. But Wednesday still has a Thing or two up her sleeve.

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Neapolitan-stuffed artichokes with a filling of fior di latte, pecorino, anchovies and lemon zest; drowned artichokes stewed with olives, parsley, and garlic.

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: A mimosa cake resembles the mimosa tree and its bright yellow flowers.

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Making mascarpone, a versatile soft cheese; mascarpone and blackberry cake; mascarpone and plum sundae.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ming Tsai is cooking ravioli two ways. He starts off with a Buttery Shrimp Ravioli in a Watercress Nage, and then follows that up with a vegetarian version -- Edamame-Shiitake Ravioli served in a Thai Coconut Broth.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ming Tsai and Henry pay homage to Boston as they cook Sausage and Peppers Fenway-Style, and a vegetarian version of this dish, Vegan Sausage and Peppers Bings.

programme.title: Spencer's Big 30
programme.desc: Who doesn't love pizza night? Host Spencer Watts whips up a Quick and Easy Duo Pizza with a fresh Tomato Basil Salad.

programme.title: The Mind of a Chef
programme.desc: Explore April Bloomfield's deep love for Italian cuisine and its influence on her cooking.

programme.title: Karena and Kasey's Foreign Flavors
programme.desc: Karena and Kasey are in the beautiful city of Rome and are on a learning curve about how to eat like a Roman.

programme.title: MIX
programme.desc: Tamee gets a taste of Italy in Downtown Los Angeles at a restaurant & bar that specializes in Northern Italian Food & Cocktails. Pasta is made by hand and drinks are made by the Godfather Of Cocktails at ROSSOBLU.

programme.title: I'll Have What Phil's Having
programme.desc: Join Phil as he revisits this food mecca. Sit down with him for a home-cooked meal at chef Nancy Silverton's Umbrian home where he indulges his inner caveman, roasting gargantuan steaks over hot flames and serving them up "barbarian style.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Host Mary Tang shows us how to celebrate the Moon Festival with a tasty menu using ingredients that are perfect for this annual harvest holiday.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Host Lisa Nguyen shows us irresistible Vietnamese dishes with French influences, including a melt-in-your-mouth Mango Crème Caramel.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: It's all about street food in this Vietnamese episode as host Lisa Nguyen cooks up some crispy Sizzling Crepes and Grilled Lemongrass Pork.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Easy to make, easy to serve and no cutlery to clean! Cooking instructor Lisa Nguyen shows us four delectable Vietnamese finger food recipes.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Host Lisa Nguyen shows us recipes from Vietnam's capital city of Hanoi, including a perfectly Grilled Pork Patty with a sweet caramel dipping sauce.

programme.title: One World Kitchen
programme.desc: Fun host Lisa Nguyen shows us just how versatile noodles are with four different recipes, including Crispy Egg Noodle Pillows (you read that right!)

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: Bob Blumer hunts for unusual eateries. A ninja waiter serves Asian food, and one shop has its own talk show.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: A Thai restaurant with tables surrounding a regulation-sized boxing ring.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: At Giligin's little people serve deep-fried food, Taiwanese cuisine is served up with fire-breathing puppets.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: A restaurant in Japan where you'll have to reel in your own dinner and another with a roaming gorilla.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: A carnival-themed restaurant, in the Czech Republic they bathe in beer; and an Alice in Wonderland restaurant.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: A restaurant entertained by a court jester; pork belly and fish 'n chips; genies and belly dancers in Japan.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: Everything at Carton King is made from recycled cardboard; at Kinderkookkafe, chefs and servers are children.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: Exotic meat is served at Clark's Fish Camp; Speed dating at No Fixed Address, a Cafe where maids serve up fun.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: The whole world has its eyes riveted on the Pyramid of Khufu, in Egypt. Yet, on the Giza plateau, other architectural masterpieces stand up to the test of time: the sphinx, the lion with a human head, and the pyramids of Pharaohs Khafra and Menkaure.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: You have to climb and follow paths that don't always appear on maps in order to discover one of the best-kept secrets of the dynasties of pharaohs which was long hidden in the sand.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: The Pyramid of Khufu is the only one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World which can still be seen in its original state. 146 metres high, 230 metres wide, and made from almost 2.5 million blocks, the Pyramid of Khufu breaks all the records.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: At the heart of Saqqara, the largest necropolis in Egypt, which was built around 2600 BC, is the Step Pyramid of Djoser. This pyramid, with its unusual design, is the first and most complex of all.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: Meidum is the least-known of the pyramids of Egypt, but the most mysterious. It stretches skywards and resembles a castle keep. Thanks to archaeology 2.0 and its drones, scientists can delve into the heart of this building.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: On the site of Dahshur, 40 km to the south of Cairo are two revolutionary monuments which would seem to be the first real pyramids. A link in the chain, which is essential to understanding the evolution in the building of pyramids.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: The whole world has its eyes riveted on the Pyramid of Khufu, in Egypt. Yet, on the Giza plateau, other architectural masterpieces stand up to the test of time: the sphinx, the lion with a human head, and the pyramids of Pharaohs Khafra and Menkaure.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: You have to climb and follow paths that don't always appear on maps in order to discover one of the best-kept secrets of the dynasties of pharaohs which was long hidden in the sand.

programme.title: Alexandria
programme.desc: Bettany Hughes looks at Alexandria past and present, unearthing archaeological gems and following in the footsteps of Hypatia, the city’s last great female philosopher and guardian of great Library of Alexandria.

programme.title: The Gangster Files
programme.desc: This program covers the exciting histories of some of the most well-known gangsters in American history: Bonnie and Clyde, Al Capone and John Dillinger.

programme.title: The Irish Mob
programme.desc: Owney “Killer” Madden started out his career in crime with Gangs of New York outfit The Gophers before moving up in the world to open and own the world famous Cotton Club.

programme.title: The Irish Mob
programme.desc: Mickey Spillane was known as "the last of the gentleman gangsters". He ran the rackets in the Hell's Kitchen neighborhood of New York and was married to the daughter of the most powerful political family in the district.

programme.title: The Irish Mob
programme.desc: Danny Greene was known as the Celtic Warrior. He ran a criminal empire in Cleveland and took on the might of the Italian mob there with no fear at all.

programme.title: The Irish Mob
programme.desc: Pat Nee started out together with James ‘Whitey’ Bulger in the Winter Hill gang in South Boston but as Whitey started to introduce drugs to the community Nee tried to stop it and eventually they parted ways and became arch enemies.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil almost come to blows when they take on the impossible – finding a flat with private parking in pricey North London for £290,000. They're helping Laura Cream, a very single-minded young lady.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: This week we're on Jersey hunting for a fabulous family home for the young couple Nick and Katrina. We show them the many highs and lows this Channel Island has to offer.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: This week we've been called in to help a lucky couple that have just scooped almost two million quid on the lottery and want to splash out on a swanky new pad.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: This week we're guiding two first time buyers through the property jungle that is East London. Rosie Evatt and Laura Coveney have been friends since childhood and are pooling their resources to buy their first property together.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: This week we're helping a young mother achieve her dream of moving back to Ireland. Sue Wessell longs to return to the place where she grew up and has persuaded husband Chris and their two children to up sticks and relocate to the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil come to the aid of newly qualified doctor Ian Ensum, as he takes his first steps on the property ladder.

programme.title: Urban Legends: The Final Cut
programme.desc: Amy (Jennifer Morrison), Travis (Matthew Davis) and Graham (Joseph Lawrence) would love to make it big in Hollywood. First, they must survive their last semester at Alpine University, where their thesis films will vie for the prestigious Hitchcock Award.

programme.title: Urban Legends: Bloody Mary
programme.desc: On a prom-night dare, a trio of high-school friends chant an incantation, unleashing an evil spirit from the past with deadly consequences.

programme.title: The Faculty
programme.desc: A group of small-town high school students discovers their teachers are under the control of mind-controlling alien parasites. From a smart script by Kevin Williamson (SCREAM), and directed by action-expert Robert Rodriguez (FROM DUSK TO DAWN).

programme.title: Grace: The Possession
programme.desc: Grace is a naive college freshman trying to deal with campus culture and her outgoing new roommate. But when a demon takes over her body and unleashes chaos, Grace returns to the cold clutches of her grandmother and the strict rules of the church.

programme.title: The Devil Inside
programme.desc: In 1989 Maria Rossi was diagnosed insane after brutally murdering three people. Twenty years later, her daughter Isabella searches for answers that lead to an exorcism of her mother.

programme.title: Bless the Child
programme.desc: Omens and concepts of good vs. evil have no place in Maggie O'Connor's well-ordered, practical universe. That is until she becomes the caregiver for mankind's last hope - a child who's just turned six.

programme.title: Oculus
programme.desc: A woman tries to exonerate her brother, who was convicted of murder, by proving that the crime was committed by a supernatural phenomenon.

programme.title: Heat
programme.desc: A group of high-end professional thieves start to feel the heat from the LAPD when they unknowingly leave a clue at their latest heist.

programme.title: The Fan
programme.desc: When the San Francisco Giants pay centerfielder Bobby Rayburn (Wesley Snipes) $40 million to lead their team to the World Series, no one is happier or more supportive than #1 fan Gil Renard (Robert De Niro). Rating: R

programme.title: The Score
programme.desc: When safe cracker Nick decides it's time to settle down with his girlfriend Diane and stick to his legitimate business, running a jazz nightclub, his friend and partner Max has other plans.

programme.title: Righteous Kill
programme.desc: Two veteran New York City detectives (Academy-Award-winners Robert De Niro and Al Pacino) hunt a vigilante who may be one of their own.

programme.title: Be Cool
programme.desc: John Travolta is back as Chili Palmer in this sequel to "Be Cool." With an all-star cast that includes Uma Thurman and The Rock, "Be Cool" is the hilarious tale about a gangster-turned-music-mogul...and what it takes to be number one with a bullet!

programme.title: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: In this “edge of your seat thriller,”* John Travolta stars as Frank Morrison, a man who discovers that his son’s new stepfather (Vince Vaughn) is not who he pretends to be.

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: When an expectant mother is found murdered, online clues lead police to every patient's worst nightmare: a doctor who uses his skills to kill rather than cure.

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen
programme.desc: When a mother and her three daughters disappear, Detectives unravel a tale of troubled love, obsession and cold-blooded killing.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A grandfather is found beaten to death on the side of the road.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A father of three is mowed down in a devastating hail of gunfire.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: Police find the body of a murder victim behind the wheel of a wrecked SUV.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A fair worker finds himself on the wrong end of a bullet.

programme.title: Intervention

programme.desc: La policía recibe una pista sobre un fugado y entra en una persecución. Se detiene a un delincuente sorpresivamente cooperativo. La policía batalla al sacar a un infractor de la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un oficial responde a un disturbio y el sospechoso rápidamente se revela. Un hombre aprende su lección sobre cinturón de seguridad. En un retén la policía descubre a un hombre triste con historia rara.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un desesperado intruso intenta evadir a la policía. Un hombre asustado quiere la atención de los oficiales, pero lo hace de mala forma. Los oficiales demuestran que la honestidad vale mucho más.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución a alta velocidad acaba de repente con una vuelta equivocada. La policía interviene cuando un enamorado plantado no capta el desprecio. Un hombre nervioso intenta ocultar su crimen.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso decide arriesgarse con el lado equivocado de una pistola eléctrica. Un delincuente intenta convencer a la policía que él es bueno. Para los oficiales algo huele mal durante un retén.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un ciclista nervioso por error revela mas de lo que planeo. La policía inspecciona un edificio para impedir un robo. Una mujer asustada no logra mantener la calma cuando la detiene la policía.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Las cosas empeoran para un conductor cuando su pasajero habla. Una mujer angustiada entrega a su prometido abusivo. Los oficiales no saben que pensar cuando detienen a un hombre muy amable.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un joven toma una decisión madura y reporta a su vecino. Cuando una madre es violenta, la abuela llama a la policía. Los oficiales interrogan a un grupo de sospechoso detrás de una parada de camiones.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un joven acusado hace todo lo que puede para escapar de la cárcel. Un abuelo salva el día cuando la mamá falla. En un retén un policía sospecha de un par de ancianos por actividad criminal.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Intensifica una pelea incluyendo alcohol y un querido mascota. Un conductor sigue cambiando su relato. Los oficiales llegan a un incidente doméstico y encuentran al sospecho en un lugar raro.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un delincuente culpa a la responsabilidad que tiene a su familia. Un papá no tiene más opción que reportar a su hijo. Los oficiales descubren artículos interesantes en el auto de un hombre de familia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un oficial pide refuerzos por tener desventaja. Un hombre vive más de lo esperado por ayudar al vecino. La policía separa a una pareja casada después de revisar su vehículo.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre astuto evade a la policía. Unos buenos samaritanos pausan lo que están haciendo cuando ven un crimen violento. Una mujer comete un delito y intenta negociar con los oficiales.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una persecución a alta velocidad cambia cuando el conductor huye a pie. Los vecinos se enojan cuando los niños hacen ejercicio. Un conductor nervioso se enoja cuando la policía registra al pasajero.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un delincuente se escapa y busca refugio con su abuela. Una explosión permite que los oficiales saquen un dispositivo. Unos vecinos preocupados rehúsan devolver un perro a sus dueños.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: La policía responde a un fatal accidente automovilístico. La policía interroga a un sospechoso de robo, pero el asegura ser la verdadera víctima. Un hombre dice que un trastorno lo hace huir.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un preso en libertad condicional lleva a los oficiales a una calle sin salida. Un novio celoso cuenta su versión que sigue cambiando. Un oficial ayuda a unas personas disgustadas a hacer las paces.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un detective se lesiona mientras persigue a un presunto ladrón de coches. Una pareja pelea en un bar y termina esposada. Encuentran una sorprendente variedad de objetos en el auto de un sospechoso.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre tiene un episodio de taquicardia y requiere asistencia médica. Una infractora parece no captar la gravedad de su situación. Son 2 contra uno cuando la policía cuestiona a un trío interesante.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The nature of Trill symbiosis is explored when a Klaestron commando legal team tries to kidnap Jadzia Dax for alleged treason committed by Curzon, the prior Dax host.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Grand Nagus Zek, the leader of the Ferengi Alliance, pays a surprise visit to lowly Quark's Bar to host a conference on exploiting the Gamma Quadrant -- and names Quark, not his own son, as his successor.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: An alien criminal from the other side of the wormhole tempts Odo by telling the shape-shifter he can put the changeling in contact with others like himself.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko, Kira, and Bashir are stranded in a war-torn world where it is impossible for the combatants to die.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Chief O'Brien is reluctantly "adopted" as a spiritual leader by a Bajoran village that annually follows the "Storyteller" to fight a demon of the town's collective fears.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A stubborn old Bajoran farmer forces Kira to take a good look at how much she has changed since her alliance with the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When members of the station find their fantasies coming to life, it becomes the prelude to a very real danger, which threatens everyone.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Odo is caught in the middle when an alien influence pits Kira against Sisko in a deadly power struggle.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix and Paris must put aside their romantic rivalry over Kes after they crash-land on a toxic planet.

programme.desc: A mysterious force puts the crew in a delusional state that causes their most deeply buried thoughts and desires to surface.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager

programme.title: StarTalk Things You Thought You Knew
programme.desc: Science is arround us every day. Astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson takes you from novice to knowledgeable, explaining how planes fly, what makes a rainbow, why hurricanes form, and the many other fascinating wonders that make up our world.

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries
programme.desc: The fundamental properties of the cosmos.

programme.title: StarTalk Cosmic Queries

programme.title: StarTalk With Neil deGrasse Tyson
programme.desc: Astrophysicist Neil deGrasse Tyson and an extraordinary lineup of top field experts dive deep into unique realms of science. Join them for thought-provoking discussions about the theories, discoveries, and phenomena that matter most to us all.

programme.title: StarTalk: Down to a Science

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 finds the planet where they believe the Sangraal is. Forced to forge temporary alliances with Adria (guest star Morena Baccarin) and Ba'al (guest star Cliff Simon) they undertake a quest to find it. Starring Ben Browder and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Discovering the frozen body of Merlin (guest star Matthew Walker), SG-1 works to help him build the Sangraal before Adria (guest star Morena Baccarin) and her Ori army can track them down. Starring Ben Browder, Amanda Tapping, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Hoping to use Merlin's phasing device to hide a village from the Ori army, something goes wrong forcing Mitchell (Ben Browder) and a critically injured Carter (Amanda Tapping) to hide themselves out of phase from an occupation of Ori soldiers.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: An experiment goes wrong leaving Lt. Colonel Samantha Carter (Amanda Tapping) trapped in a parallel reality where martial law has been enforced and Earth is under attack from the Ori. Also starring Ben Browder, Christopher Judge, and Michael Shanks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When Daniel Jackson turns up as a Prior asking SG-1 to aid him in a plan that might very well be a trap, it's up to Maj. Gen. Jack O'Neill and the team to not only save Jackson's life, but possibly end the war with the Ori once and for all.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay is called back to earth to convince his estranged sister, Jeannie Miller, to assist the Air Force. McKay and Jeannie travel to Atlantis and begin the experiment which is initially successful until a McKay from the parallel universe appears.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Major Leonard's team fails to check in with Atlantis while on a mission. Following the energy readings in hope of finding Major Leonard and his men, McKay leads the team into a cave to discover that the cause the energy spike is a Wraith generator.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The now awakened Ancients meet with O'Neill and Woolsey, thanking them for taking care of the city but also asking them to vacate Atlantis. While Ronon and Teyla stay in the Pegasus galaxy, the rest struggle to resume their lives on Earth.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: O'Neill and Woolsey, the lone survivors of the replicators' bloody coup, hide out in an abandoned section of the city. Knowing Landry has an order to nuke Atlantis if a foothold situation should ever arise, the two lay low awaiting their fate.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Teyla begins to see apparitions of ancients in distress and believes they are the ghosts of the Ancients recently massacred by the Replicators. McKay believes he's found the whale that saved him a year ago while trapped in a submerged puddle jumper.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team hear of a great warrior with stories of defeating both the Genii and Wraith and seek him out in hopes of making a new ally. But when they learn this great warrior is none other than Lucius they believe he's up to his old tricks again.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Trying to preserve power by turning off all the non-essential systems the Ancients recently activated before being killed by the replicators, McKay mistakenly is hit by an energy beam from a mysterious device.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Lorne discovers a planet with dozens of satellites in orbit. However, inhabitants on this planet are no further advanced than the renaissance and have a flag with McKay's face. The team realize a game they had found earlier might be more than a game.
